title: BFF Happy Spring
description: Welcome to the Bff Happy Spring games. Princesses Belle, Tiana, and Moana are best friends. They planned to organize a party to welcome the most adorable spring season. They already filled their wardrobe with a cherry blossom collection of outfits. Being a design expert join and help them to choose the best outfit for them. Have fun!

title: Axe Throw
description:
Ready to test your precision? Welcome to Axe Throw, the ultimate test of aim and timing. The rules are simple, but the challenge is endless. You have one goal: Break the target.

But be careful—the path to victory is rigged with danger. Explosive bombs are moving, and blocking your way. One wrong move, and it's game over!

title: Color Cargo Puzzle Rush
description: Color Cargo Puzzle Rush is the ultimate blend of color puzzle games, and sorting games! Dive into this stress-relieving world of ASMR games where you match delivery boxes with the right cargo buses by their colors. Perfect for fans of color sort puzzle and fun games, this game is all about strategy, speed, and precision.

title: Lost Puppy Rescue and Care
description: Welcome to Lost Puppy Rescue and Care. A small pup is lost in the rain, cold and alone. He’s not sure who to trust—but with your care, that starts to change. Gently clean him up, feed him, and help him feel safe again. This calm, story-like game is all about kindness, connection, and giving one little dog a second chance.

title: Zoo Anomaly Simulation
description: Experience a zoo mutation crisis like no other. In Zoo Anomaly Simulation, a peaceful zoo has turned into a nightmare filled with mutated animals, and you’re the only one who can stop the chaos! Enter a first-person shooting experience like no other. Explore the eerie zoo environment, grab your weapons, and fight back against giraffes, zebras, elephants, etc.

title: Home Rush The Fish War
description:
Engage in an epic battle between Humans and The Fish!
Your goal is simple: drag and hold to move the Human to the perfect spot to defeat The Fish. Watch out for obstacles and tough enemies along the way. Take down The Fish, then return safely to the starting point. But remember, only Humans of the same color can defeat The Fish! Experience exciting levels with increasing challenges, stunning 3D visuals, unique characters, and easy-to-learn controls for all ages.
Enjoy the adventure!

title: Scary Teacher 3D Returns
description:
Start with the size of a board. A faint sound echoes through the hallway. You freeze, the heart is beating, and the house seems to breathe with you. You are inside the mansion of the old teacher once again.

In the 3D fear teacher, every shadow, every echo matters. Your goal is not to escape; it is mischief. But make an error, and you will become its next goal.

title: Hero Merge
description:
Hero Merge is an exciting tower defense game where strategy and firepower combine! Merge your heroes to create stronger units, strategically position them on grid, and defend your wall against waves of different enemies. Unlimited waves, plenty of perks and many different units!

Will your heroes stand strong, or will the enemies break through?

title: Fix Da Brainrot
description: Fix Da Brainrot is a quirky jigsaw puzzle game with pieces that look like torn paper. Pick your challenge —16 pieces for a quick and easy fix or 32 pieces for a real brain teaser. Drag, drop, and fit the torn pieces together, and watch the picture slowly come alive as you fix the brainrot and conquer the puzzle!

title: Sweet business of cats: cakes
description:
An exciting game in which you have to interact with a variety of objects, manage cells and create delicious cakes based on original recipes.
31 unique cakes!
6 ingredients that can be combined!
More than a 13 000 customers!

title: Dusty Cat
description: Help the little speck of dust to grow into a real cat! Eat other dust, avoid larger enemies and grow to see all the phases of your Dusty Cat! Collect points and compete with other players to get your scores on the leaderboard!

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Soccer Arena X
description: Soccer Arena X is an exciting football game that delivers dynamic matches, simple controls, and colorful arcade gameplay. Every match is fast, fun, and full of energy, giving you the ultimate multiplayer football experience. As you progress, you’ll collect coins and gems to unlock powerful abilities like freeze, lightning, super kick, or a giant head, adding a bright and entertaining arcade style to the gameplay. Step onto the pitch, score goals, and become a football star!

title: Snow Road Puzzle
description: Play Snow Road Puzzle free online — an addictive browser puzzle game with no download, no install, and no login required. Slide icy tiles, create snowy roads, and solve fast-paced logic puzzle levels instantly. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and brain puzzle challenges at school or home. This free online puzzle game is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and fully playable on desktop or phone. Enjoy endless winter logic puzzles and sharpen your brain anytime, anywhere.

title: Color Wood Animal Jam
description: Begin a charming logic puzzle match game in Color Wood Animal Jam. Drag the colorful wooden animal pieces into their correct spots. Complete each delightful jam puzzle. One wrong move can make the color block jam even trickier.

title: Color Sort: Impostor Edition
description: Color Sort Impostor Edition is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your logic and focus. Sort the colorful characters into the correct tubes so that each tube contains only one color. The rules are simple, but the puzzles quickly become more challenging as new colors and obstacles appear. Plan your moves carefully, avoid mistakes, and enjoy a smooth, satisfying sorting experience designed for players of all ages.

title: Mall Anomaly
description: Mall Anomaly is not your usual mall trip. Instead of shopping, you’re stuck in endless hallways where mannequins stare, furniture floats, and unusual kitties vanish into thin air. Spot these bizarre anomalies before the place completely glitches out—it’s like spot the difference, but in a cursed shopping center.

title: Wave Road 3D
description: Wave Road 3D is a fast-paced reflex game that challenges your focus, timing, and precision. You control a sleek arrow gliding through a floating road filled with gears, traps, and collectible gems. Whether you’re chasing high scores in endless mode, conquering 20 handcrafted levels in classic mode, or racing head-to-head with a friend in 2 player mode, Wave Road 3D offers a refreshing and dynamic experience.

title: Hidden Object: Emily's Case
description:
A detective adventure set in Victorian London.

Search for hidden objects, uncover clues, and investigate the disappearance of a young girl. Solve puzzles, play mini-games, and step by step reveal the secrets of the old city.

title: My Tiny Land
description: An ultra-quiet and super stress-relieving fruit and vegetable matching game with hundreds of types of fruits waiting for you to collect.

title: Grandma's Last Stand
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones. But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka. Help Granny get home, roast them all!

INSTRUCTIONS

title: Island Puzzle: Build & Solve
description: Welcome to the ultimate Island Puzzle adventure! Test your logic and strategy skills in this captivating logic puzzle and building game.

title: Ludo World
description: Experience endless fun with various vibrant environments, where every roll of the dice brings a new challenge. Choose between classic or quick mode, progress along the trophy road, and prove you're the master of the board with every move you make.

title: Shell Strikers
description:
Shell Strikers is an exciting turn-based artillery combat game where strategy meets action. Lead your team of soldiers in intense battles across diverse battlefields including war-torn cities, scorching deserts, and peaceful meadows.

Each turn, you must carefully aim your shots, account for wind conditions, and choose the right weapon from your arsenal. Available weapons include rockets, bombs, laser guns, airstrikes, and dynamite - each with unique properties and limited ammo.

title: Knife Master : Ball Racing
description:
Chop chop chop, throw the knife, but don't hit the ball~!
It's like the mastery of circus performer. Which means, it's fun! Let's be the master of throwing knives and bounce the ball to the sky!

title: Bubble Pop Legend
description:
Bubble Pop Legend is the best way to kill time.
Aim & shoot to pop all colorful bubbles to clear the board and win coins.
You'll spend hours with fun & addictive Bubble Pop Legend to keep your mind active.

▶ How to Play

• Aim carefully and tap where you want to shoot
• Match 3 or more bubbles of same color to pop them
• Pop all colorful bubbles to win levels
• Use less shots to get higher score and earn 3 stars
• Plan and use epic boosters at the right time to BLAST ALL LEVELS

title: Math Crossword Puzzle - Genius Edition
description: Challenge your brain with Math Crossword, the perfect mix of logic puzzles and number games! Solve clever math equations in a crossword-style grid by placing the correct numbers into the right spots. Each level sharpens your brain with fun and rewarding challenges that test your addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division skills.

title: City Gas Station Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of running a bustling gas station? City Gas Station Simulator lets you experience the thrill of managing every detail of your very own station in a fun 3D casual simulator! From fueling cars to running a mini shop, every choice is yours to make. Fun and addictive casual management gameplay. Mix shopping and service for maximum efficiency.

title: Split Shot: Ball Adventure
description: Drag the ball, set your direction, and navigate through a cosmic field! Collect all the stars while skillfully avoiding dangerous spikes. How many can you gather?

title: Wordling: Daily Word Challenge
description: Wordling is a fun, free daily word puzzle game where you guess the hidden word in 6 tries using color-coded clues. Perfect for adults and seniors who love brain games, spelling challenges, and relaxing, ad-free gameplay. Explore all game modes!

title: Make Ten Tiles
description: Play Make Ten Tiles free online and sharpen your skills in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Merge number tiles, add to ten, and solve each logic puzzle in a satisfying brain game that blends fun with real mental math practice. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks and focused learning.

title: Survival in Area 51
description: You will play as the character Stas, who works in Area 51. One day, Stas was given a strange task, to find acid and pour it into an unusual device. Then something terrible happened... In Area 51, an explosion occurred underground, and zombies appeared. They began to attack scientists and guards. Your task is to destroy zombies, mercenaries and find a way out of this terrible underground place. The game offers shooting, simple puzzles, a plot, many locations and a final battle.

title: Cozy Kitchen Merge
description: This is an addictive cooking-themed merge game you won't be able to put down. Here, you'll become a kitchen master by merging identical ingredients and dishes to create new, more delicious cuisine. From simple vegetables to exotic feasts, continuously unlock tasty recipes from around the world. Fulfill customer orders to earn coins, and use them to upgrade and decorate your kitchen, transforming it from a humble diner into a dream culinary paradise.

title: Pogo Masters
description: Bounce into action in Pogo Masters! Race against rivals in chaotic, physics-based platform battles where balance is everything. Compete online against players worldwide or challenge a friend locally on the same PC. Unlock dozens of unique characters, stylish pogo sticks, and eye-catching trail effects as you climb the global leaderboard. Fast-paced, competitive, and endlessly fun — become the ultimate pogo champion!

title: Water Sort Puzzle 3
description: Face a super satisfying liquid sorting challenge with Water Sort Puzzle 3! This addictive puzzle game turns simple color sorting into a relaxing yet brain-teasing experience you won’t want to stop playing! This game is perfect for those who enjoy calm but clever challenges. It trains your logic while keeping the experience relaxing and fun. As a true casual game, it’s ideal for quick breaks and time killing, making every moment feel satisfying and rewarding!

title: Tripeaks Solitaire Escapes
description: Play Solitaire TriPeaks Escapes, a relaxing card game with a warm summer vibe. Explore hundreds of unique solitaire levels featuring stunning graphics and vibrant beach landscapes. Master challenging card puzzles using powerful boosters, train your brain and sharpen your strategy. Dive into this colorful TriPeaks world and enjoy a soothing, slow-paced adventure. Escape the daily grind and find your zen in every hand you play!

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
Arrow Slide Puzzle
description:
Arrow Slide Puzzle — Logic Puzzle Game
Arrow Slide Puzzle is a clean and engaging logic puzzle game where you slide arrows across the board to clear the field and reveal a hidden picture. Simple rules turn into deep challenges that test your logic, planning, and spatial thinking. Perfect for fans of arrow puzzles, sliding logic games, and relaxing brain teasers.

? Download now and start solving today!

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Diamond Solitaire Mahjong
description: Step into the radiant world of Diamond Solitaire Mahjong! Enjoy a beautifully crafted single puzzle with shimmering tiles adorned with diamonds, gems, and sparkling jewels. Zoom in and out for the perfect view as you match tiles in a relaxing setting. Earn points for quick matches and climb the leaderboard. Perfect for casual players and Mahjong fans seeking a peaceful yet rewarding experience.

title: Chess Duel
description: Master the art of chess with three exciting modes, each offering flexible time settings to suit every player. Take your chess skills to the next level, climb the ranks from Bronze to Diamond and strive to become a top chess player.

title: Erase the extra element
description: Sharpen your focus and logic in Erase the Extra Element! Erase parts of each scene to reveal clues and solve tricky visual puzzles.

title: People Playground 3d
description: Playground 3D is an exciting physics-based 3D battle simulator where you can create and customize epic fights between two teams: Blue and Red. Featuring ragdoll physics and dynamic fighter movements, the game lets you design thrilling combat scenarios.

title: Dress Up Run
description: Play Dress Up Runway, the ultimate fashion dress up game where style meets speed! Collect outfits, change looks on the go, and shine in the final runway walk. Perfect for players searching “dress up game,” “fashion game,” or “makeover run,” this stylish challenge lets you become a fashion queen while racing through exciting levels. With princess vibes, outfit makeovers, and endless glam fun, Dress Up Runway is the best free fashion challenge for US teens and students!

title: Food Jam
description: Food Jam is a fun and satisfying puzzle game where you sort fruits, veggies, and drinks into the right takeout carts. With over 500 juicy levels, unlock delicious new themes like desserts and juices! Use unique power-ups to clear tricky jams and keep your customers happy.

title: Food Sort 3D
description:
In this game, you manage your own food court, sorting various food items into their respective categories. You'll encounter different eateries, from fast-food joints to upscale restaurants, each requiring you to sort items like burgers,
sushi, hotdog, fries, pizza and desserts. The game features colorful graphics and quick, satisfying levels that keep you engaged as you expand your food

title: Mine Jump
description: Jump into action! ? Test your logic and reflexes in this addictive game. Collect slugs, upgrade your hero, and uncover the secrets of a mysterious planet! ?✨

title: LOGic Slide
description:
Get ready for some beaver fun in LOGic Slide – the cutest puzzle in the forest!
Meet two friendly beavers who love playing with wood. They need your help to slide the logs and make one big river-wide log . 
It might look easy, but you’ll need to think and figure out where each log should go!

Let’s slide some logs together with the beavers – start playing right away! ?✨

title: Deadflip Frenzy
description:
Deadflip Frenzy is a wild stunt-flipping action game where chaos meets style! Launch your character into the air, pull off insane flips, twists, and bone-crunching landings — all in the name of fun (and maybe a little destruction).

Bounce off trampolines, launch from cannons, smash through obstacles, and aim for the most outrageous combos. The more insane your flip, the higher your score. But beware — one bad landing and it’s ragdoll mayhem!

title: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game
description: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game lets you become the ultimate nail artist! Step into your very own nail salon where creativity has no limits. Design stunning acrylic nails with trendy styles, vibrant colors, and charming accessories. Satisfy your customers' unique requests, earn money, and upgrade your salon to become the best nail stylist in town!

title: Koko Loco Block Blast
description: Think fast, blast smart — can you beat your best score? Blast blocks, fit shapes, and outsmart the grid in this fast-paced puzzle challenge! Every move counts: clear space, chain combos, and keep the board from filling up. With smooth controls, colorful blocks, and quick rounds, it’s perfect for casual fun or deep strategy. Easy to pick up, hard to put down — how high can you climb the high score ladder?

title: Mahjong Crimes - Puzzle Story
description:
MYSTERIOUS FEATURES

Play 100+ Mahjong exciting levels! 
Dive into Agatha Christie's stories 
Use boosters and collect tile sets

PLAY MAHJONG

Mahjong Crimes is a puzzle game where you match tiles to find clues and solve crimes. Use power-ups to beat tricky levels and win awards!

SOLVE CRIMES

Join detective Hercule Poirot on the Orient Express to solve crimes in this Mahjong game! Match tiles to investigate, defeat thugs, and untangle mysteries. Fun guaranteed!

title: Make Two
description:
In Make Two, your job is simple. Give each customer two of the same food! Drag the matching items to the hungry customers before time runs out.

- Beat the clock to clear each level
- Match food pairs to fulfill orders
- Earn coins for every satisfied customer. The more you serve, the more you earn!
- Use your coins to unlock new cute customers.

Fast-paced, satisfying, and easy to pick up. Make Two is the perfect bite-sized game to test your reflexes and memory.

title: Snake Puzzle Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced puzzle experience where your goal is to wiggle the snake through each grid while avoiding obstacles and other snakes. With simple controls and a variety of challenging levels, this is the perfect game for quick play during your free time.

title: Monster Slayer Merge & Survive
description: Welcome to our thrilling adventure game! Your journey consists of two main parts: merging items and exploring dungeons. Embark on this epic journey, combine powerful items, and conquer the depths of the dungeon!

title: Arrow Sorting
description: Arrow! Sorting Food is a satisfying puzzle adventure where every move changes the board. Tap the arrows to unravel colorful fruit chains, clear paths, and untangle tricky patterns across countless levels. Unlock new visual themes, collect fun skins, and enjoy relaxing yet brain-teasing gameplay that grows more challenging with every stage. Simple to learn, surprisingly addictive to master!

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Mojicon Garden JigSolitaire
description: Piece together a paradise in Mojicon Garden Jigsaw Solitaire! Solve beautiful puzzles to restore a dry meadow back to a lush, blooming garden. Enjoy a meditative experience with smooth controls and the iconic Mojicon art style. Can you bring the garden back to life?

title: Avenger Guard
description: Dark forces have destroyed your homeland—rise as the Avenger Guard! Merge heroes to unlock power, fortify defenses, and take vengeance. Lead your legendary squad to repel waves of enemies, upgrade through fusion, and reclaim what’s yours. Will you be the last line of defense?

title: Obby On a Bike
description: Obby On a Bike, a thrilling bike-riding platformer that combines exciting obstacle courses with fun parkour gameplay! It features two exciting gameplay modes: Normal and Challenge. In Normal mode, you can carefully ride through each level without the stress of a timer. Challenge mode lets you test your speed and skill as you race against time. Whether you're playing alone or competing head-to-head in the 2 Player mode, there's always a thrilling challenge awaiting you!

title: Stickman: Dinosaur arena
description: Take command of a squad of dinosaurs and go into battle with them! Reinforce your squad, unlock new dinosaurs and upgrade existing ones. Go as far as possible and become a great Dino Commander!

title: Radiant Rush
description: Radiant Rush is a minimalist synthwave drifting game where you control only the car's steering—not its speed. Your goal is to complete increasingly challenging levels while collecting all the datacubes scattered throughout.

title: Basket Sport Stars
description: A great basket challenge begins with random characters and with random basketball arenas with the Basket Sport Stars game! Play single or 2 player! The game consists of many levels, characters, and various game modes like Tournament, Quick Matches, 2 player Matches, and Practice Matches. You can play any of these modes for free, without unlocking. Pick most of the characters for free and start shooting your opponent's basket hoop!

title: Mech Monster Arena
description: Mech Monster Arena is a robot-fighting turn-based strategy game. Differently in this fighting game, you don't need to learn how to operate the robot and release each skill. You only need to learn the basic skill counter rules and select the skills flexibly. By earning EXPs and coins from battles in Mech Battle, you can fight with AI opponents and develop your robot. When you have some sources to upgrade your robot in the Mech Warehouse, you can challenge other players in the Arena. Have fun!

title: Stick Boy: Bazooka Ragdoll
description: Unleash chaos in Stick Boy: Bazooka War! Blast through levels with a variety of powerful bazookas, each with unique abilities. Obliterate enemies, destroy bases, and demolish everything in your path. Choose the perfect ammo to send ragdoll foes flying and experience thrilling destruction as you crush their strongholds. Help Stick Boy annihilate all adversaries and conquer every level in this explosive adventure!

title: Stealth Master Sneak Cat
description: Stealth Master: Sneak Cat is a fun stealth adventure game that lets you play the role of a cute cat. You will sneak through various missions! Move quietly under the close watch of enemies and surveillance equipment.

title: Bubble Merge 2048
description: Welcome to Bubble Merge 2048, where classic 2048 meets exciting bubble-blasting action! Shoot, merge, and blast through puzzles filled with colourful bubbles and challenges. Match numbers and colours, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and smash obstacles as you journey through this one-of-a-kind adventure.

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Stickman Rogue Online
description: Get ready for an exciting stickman adventure! You will enter an exciting survival battlefield.Fight nervous battles against increasing enemies constantly. Collect experience points and progress through endless waves of enemies. Each wave of enemies is more challenging, so be careful to upgrade your skills to survive! Collect energy boosters in battle to upgrade your stickman skills. Increase speed, increase attack or increase defense.

title: Gun Racing
description: Here you cannot just race with other cars, but destroy them with the help of numerous weapons. Improve your riding skills and take first places in tournaments!

title: Block Dropping Merge
description:
Block Dropping Merge is a special but classic number merge puzzle. It's easy to play but hard to master.
Show us how good you are among other puzzlers!

1024 2048 4096 8192 16384... Drop them numbers and merge to get bigger numbers and show how smart you are!

Play and share your best score now!

title: Find It - Find The Differences
description: Find It is an engaging puzzle game that tests your observation skills as you search for subtle differences between two nearly identical images. With colorful visuals and beautifully designed scenes, each level presents a fresh challenge. Whether you're spotting tiny details or uncovering hidden objects, Find It will keep you entertained and focused. Hone your attention to detail, enjoy the excitement of finding every difference, and experience hours of fun suitable for all ages!

title: Memory Lane
description:
Your goal in each level is to reach the Goal Platform. Levels are played in two phases.
A. Reveal Phase:
Duration: Short preview at the start of each level
•	All platforms become visible.
•	Study the layout, paths, traps, and pickups.
Your task: Remember what you see

B. Action Phase:
•	All memory phase platforms become invisible unless they are marked to stay visible.
•	Touching platforms reveals them permanently.
Your task: Reach the goal using your memory and reflexes.

title: Hero Tower Wars Merge Puzzle
description: Join the exciting world of Hero Tower Wars - Merge Puzzle! Here is filled with tower defense strategy and merging games. Being careful of strategy and quick thinking are important. You'll play as a brave hero, battling enemies in layers of towers by mergers and digital strategies. Each tower has a different number of enemies. Use every number and a stronger sword to defeat enemies.

title: Foam and Find
description: Foam and Find is a relaxing hidden object game with a playful bubble twist. Explore cozy houses, each filled with charming rooms and easy-to-spot hidden items. Your tasks appear inside floating bubbles — and when you find an item, it flies into its bubble and pops with a satisfying animation. No timers, no stress — just a calm, casual experience at your own pace.

title: Pushover 3D
description: Unleash your creativity in *Pushover 3D*! Draw unique curves to control your ragdoll fighter’s moves, launching them in unexpected ways to defeat opponents. Each match is a wild, physics-based showdown where every line transforms into unpredictable body motions. From wild spins to slingshot leaps, it’s all up to the patterns you create. Experiment, outsmart your rivals, and become a master of ragdoll combat!

title: Rough Ball
description: Bounce wildly in Rough Ball! Control your cute purple ball across wall-to-wall platforms, dodging spikes, skulls, and deadly drops. Collect shiny coins, unlock free burger skins, and conquer chaotic levels. Don't fall down—jump, roll, and thrive in pixel-perfect adventure!

title: Motor Tour
description: In Motor tour, the ultimate racing game, you'll experience an unforgettable adrenaline-pumping adventure with multiple modes to choose from. Take on fierce competitors, embark on an endless journey, or take things up a notch by daringly weaving through traffic with heart-stopping near misses. Don't wait any longer, start playing now and immerse yourself in this epic experience that is sure to leave you on the edge of your seat!

title: Ole Bunny
description: Ole Bunny plunges you into a crazy arena where a cute bunny finds himself because of his love for roses ! Now you must show courage and skill to escape the wild bulls and collect as many fragrant roses as possible. Can you become the best bunny matador of all time?

title: Zombie Outbreak Survive
description: With this entertaining game you will have to run throughout the city, run and shoot because the zombies are fast and dangerous, they will not stop chasing you to devour you.The zombie apocalypse has arrived and the terror of surviving has arrived with this new game. Zombie Outbreak Survive is a 3D game with impressive and realistic graphics that will make your hair stand on end and you will feel the true fear of being devoured.

title: Flip It 3D
description: In this fun and challenging puzzle platform game, test your strategic thinking as you navigate through levels where flipping platforms is the key to survival! Goblins and knights have different abilities, and they must be moved carefully across platforms to complete each level. But be careful—characters can only survive a limited number of flips, and platforms can't be flipped if they are occupied!

title: Battle Tanks Firestorm
description:
This game has incorporated the best of famous tank games. 
You can choose the tank that you like best, or prefer a more powerful version. Go to the levels and defend your base from the enemy. At your disposal are more than 15 types of tanks with various upgrades: armor, upgrades of the first, second and third levels. These improvements will help you gain an advantage over the enemy tank army.

title: Fruit Sort Logic
description: Fruit Sort Logic is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you sort colorful fruit juices on shelves. Move the juices around and match three of the same kind to clear a shelf. Space is limited, so each move matters. Clear all shelves to finish the level and unlock new ones. With smooth controls, bright visuals, and endless levels, the game is easy to play and satisfying to master. Perfect for a calm but clever puzzle experience.

title: 2 Player Mini Challenge
description: 2 Player Mini Challenge is an online casual game. If you want to play with your friends on the same device, or if you want to play alone against the AI, this is the game for you! This 2-player game collection features beautifully minimalist graphics that allow you to focus on going head-to-head with your opponent. The more participants you have, the more fun you'll have as you practice skills, react quickly, and interact with friends, relatives, and coworkers in a whole new way.

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Vault Breaker
description: Can you help our furry thief crack open a vault harbouring a hidden secret? Click when the marker crosses the button and unlock the vault now.

title: Hero Rabbit Idle Survivor RPG
description: We are rabbits! A fun offline survival shooting RPG game starring a rabbit!Hero Rabbit is an offline game. Players can play games anytime, anywhere without connecting to WiFi and the Internet.

title: Merge Cube Challenge
description: Merge Cube Challenge offers a unique 2048 experience with its innovative endless mode. You can play alone or compete with your friends. Also, test your strategy and quick thinking skills by competing against the CPU. In endless mode, try to get the highest score by using the bomb special power. With the excitement increasing with each move, collect points and leave your opponents behind! Are you ready to immerse yourself in this excitement?

title: Merge Blocks 2048 Style!
description: ● A game with a summer atmosphere! Compete with friends and colleagues?! In the game you have a playing area? where cubes fall and merge if they have the same number! Merge as many cubes as possible to make the biggest one, save up points?! Be the first on the leaderboard?! Play and relax ?!

title: Frost Defense
description:
❄️ Embark on a thrilling journey through a frozen wilderness in Frost Defense, a strategic tower defense game that puts your tactical skills to the test! ??

In this action-packed adventure, you'll take on the role of a lone survivor ?‍♂️ battling against the relentless onslaught of arctic creatures ??‍❄️?.
The enemy is merciless — only your ingenuity and strategic prowess can keep you alive in this harsh frozen world. ⚔️?️

title: Worms
description: Worms is a fun and addictive arcade puzzle where you control a cute worm and guide it through winding labyrinths. Your task is to lead the worm through the entire maze, collect rewards, use portals and avoid dead ends. Bright cartoon-style graphics and easy controls make the game perfect for both kids and adults. Worms combines fast arcade action with puzzle-solving logic, turning every new level into a fresh and exciting challenge.

title: CarJamcolor
description:
There was a long queue of passengers at the public station platform with a "car jam" in the parking lot! what to do?

Now it's time for the cars to transport passengers, you need to move them...but wait! You need to do it in the right order. Because other cars in the parking lot that become an obstacle! Can you solve this tricky parking puzzle and get all the cars on the road?
what are you waiting for? Challenge your brain with this tricky game now!

title: Basket Shot
description: Anyone may enjoy the swelteringly popular arcade game Basket Shot! Become the next basketball superstar by shooting baskets and unlocking new balls!

title: We Are In A Simulation Simulator
description: We Are In A Simulation Simulator challenges you to question nothing and mimic everything. Blend in by copying the actions of others to survive in a strange digital world where free will doesn’t exist. Stay alert, follow the crowd, and don’t get caught acting out of sync. Play for free online on mobile or desktop and test your ability to conform in this mysterious simulation!

title: Zen Master - 3 tiles
description:
You can test your skills in this addictive puzzle game without time or place constraints. If you like solving problems like Match 3, Sudoku or Mahjong, then you will definitely like this game.

Collect three identical tiles to clear the board. Your goal is to completely clear the board of a variety of picture tiles. The levels start out easy and relaxing, but gradually become more challenging and addictive!

title: Black pink Black Friday Fever
description: Blackpink Black Friday Fever is a fun dress-up game designed for K-pop and Blackpink fans! Dive into the world of style by creating unique looks for Jisoo, Jennie, Rosé, and Lisa, inspired by Black Friday’s biggest fashion trends. As a fan, you’ll get to style each member of Blackpink with a range of outfits and accessories that perfectly suit their personalities.

title: Big Block Blast
description:
Place triangles and blocks to build 2x2 BIG BLOCKS! Drag and drop shapes into the grid to complete full squares made of triangles. Matching colors gives you bonus points, so in Big Block Blast you must aim for smart and colorful combos!
Some blocks have special powers and can even be placed on top of others. Use them strategically to unlock new moves and clear space. Big Block Blast is a simple to play game but tricky to master! How many BIG BLOCKS can you make?

title: Cuddle Monster Fusion
description: Engage, Merge, and Challenge! Dive into a world of cuddly creatures where you combine identical monsters to evolve them and keep them from overflowing. But here’s the twist: when the same monsters collide, they transform into an entirely new, adorable creature. Can you merge your way to the ultimate fluffy beast?

title: Balloon Pop Frenzy
description:
Balloon Pop Frenzy is a fun and fast-paced tap game where you pop balloons for points!
Tap normal and gold balloons to score, but avoid the tricky skull balloons!
With vibrant visuals, increasing difficulty, and simple controls, it's perfect for quick, casual play on any device.

title: Fashion Princess Dress Up
description: Fashion Princess: Dress Up is a casual game. With beautiful animations and sound effects, this game is sure to keep you hooked. Swipe left and right to control the character and choose the corresponding dress up according to the task to show off your matching trendy outfits, hairstyles, and make-up, you need to consider the theme of the fashion show, and the judge's preference. If your score is higher, you will win the battle and become the ultimate fashionista.

title: SUIKA WATERMELON DROP
description: Engage, merge, and challenge yourself in this thrilling fruit-matching journey! Drop and collide identical fruits to evolve them, preventing them from falling out of the box. But here's the exciting twist: every time matching fruits collide, they transform into a completely new one. Can you keep merging your way up to the ultimate prize, the grand watermelon? The challenge awaits!

title: Monster Truck Crush
description: Monster Truck Crush is a skillful balanced monster truck racing arcade game. With 3D monster trucks, you need to defeat the AI opponent by arriving at the finish line in the first place. You can speed up immediately when your vehicle is balanced on the next platform. Or else, you will lose some speed or roll the truck. The AI opponent is good at controlling the speed. But you can control the body angle of the car to keep speeding up. Good luck!

title: Trial Xtreme
description: Trial Xtreme is an exciting game in which you have to get a new experience from driving a motorcycle. Experience a sea of adrenaline while riding a motorcycle and passing 30 levels with dizzying and spectacular obstacles.

title: Real Motorbike Simulator Race 3D
description: Ride in the most awesome environment of this best superbike simulator 2024 which is designed especially for performing the craziest bike tricks and stunts to win amazing prizes in this Extreme Motorbike Simulator Game. the realistic physics of fast motorcycle and a lot of options to choose between different motorbikes give you unlimited fun in Extreme Motorbike Simulator 3d.

title: Gal Sliding Puzzle
description:
It's a classic sliding puzzle.
You can challenge yourself by increasing the difficulty level from 3*3, 4*4, 5*5.
Train and activate your brain~
Complete it and meet various pretty girls.

title: Christmas Blocks Sort
description: Blocks Sort Christmas Edition brings a cozy holiday twist to the classic sorting puzzle. All the blocks have turned into festive Christmas colors like bright red, pine green, frosty blue, and warm gold. They start mixed together in different columns, and your job is to sort them so each column ends up with just one color. The rules are simple, but the challenge is still satisfying. Think ahead, plan your moves, and slowly bring order to the holiday chaos.

title: Battle Arena Race to Win
description: Battle Arena Race to Win is a high-octane arena game where you join the Red or Blue team and engage in fierce car battles. Choose from a variety of cars, collect and upgrade them to dominate the arena. Balance speed, durability, and acceleration to outmaneuver opponents. Equip your car with strategic items, upgrade for success, and climb the leaderboard to lead your team to victory!

title: The Noob Aventures
description:
The Noob Adventures invites you to join a dangerous journey through a colorful world full of action, traps, and enemies. Travel across challenging lands in search of diamonds and overcome all obstacles. Complete 70 levels packed with danger and surprises as you fight enemies determined to stop your progress. Rescue the friends, survive the challenges along the way, and prove that even a noob can become a true hero.
Collect diamonds and unlock new characters to continue your adventure

title: Barry Prison Hide And Seek
description: Begin an exciting escape game in the Barry Prison: Hide And Seek! Enter an exciting and challenging prison environment. You’ll join in a nervous game of hide and seek. Enjoy the fun role-playing. As the obby or Barry. Will you play as a brave escapee, or will you be the cold-hearted guard? Begin an exciting game of “hide and seek”, successfully hide and collect seals to defeat the boss, or find all the hidden escapees to stop their plans?

title: Brick Breaker Chipi Chipi Chapa Chapa Cat
description:
Break bricks, collect power-ups for more fun breaking bricks and watch Chipy Chipy Chipa Cat and El Primo Bara Bere dancing. Go through interesting and exciting levels in the fun game about Chippy Chippy Chippy Chappa Chappa Cat and El Primo.
Pass levels of different difficulty and set a personal record.

title: WorldCraft 3
description: Are you ready to survive in pixel world ? This is a challenge game survive in the pixel worlds, You have to prepare for every situations. You can fly and with your grenade you explode blocks world. You can collect items to your inventory

title: Overprotective Boyfriend
description: Imagine the beautiful Princess Marie standing in front of a mirror, looking at her reflection. Her eyes are shining, and a sly smile plays on her lips. She is ready to put on an outfit that will emphasize her grace and charm. But then her lover appears and frowns: «My dear, are you really going to wear such an open dress?» Marie knows that her faithful knight sometimes takes too much care of her, but today she intends to look dazzling!

title: The Office Escape
description: The Office Escape is an exciting adventure where every step towards freedom becomes a test for the Regime and the thinking factor!

title: Zombie Space Episode II
description: There has been an outbreak of a zombie virus on a space station. The first group of mercenaries has disappeared. Your task is to find survivors among the zombies and find out the cause of the zombie apocalypse. You will have to fight with a horde of zombies, using different types of weapons. Look for hidden weapons in chests. Upgrade characters and weapons! Use your characters' abilities in heated battles against zombies. Play with a friend on the same device or alone!

title: Stellar Fusion
description:
Enter the captivating universe of Celestia —
As the stellar Alchemist, you alone possess the power to restore cosmic balance. Manipulate essences represented by vibrant tiles and solve intricate puzzles to restore balance in Stellar Fusion!

title: Turbo Stars
description:
Hop on your skateboard and speed down the track in this wild and fast-paced racing game!

Zoom through a wide variety of exhilarating tracks and defeat your opponents!

Think fast to pick up items that will help you gain an advantage — or even pick up and throw your competitors if they get too close to you! 

Don’t forget to snatch coins and keys to unlock a whole bunch of awesome items, including power-ups, new objects to ride on, and gear for your character.

title: Farm Match Seasons 3
description: With over 2700+ levels and a relaxing soundtrack to enjoy, Farm Match Seasons 3 is a charming Match 3 game that continues the story of the beautiful farm in the village. Your friend Poppy needs your help managing the farm — harvesting strawberries, collecting flowers, and protecting butterflies in the fields. Don’t forget to keep those pesky weeds under control! This sequel comes packed with a major content update and new challenges to discover.

title: Rooftop Challenge
description: Rooftop Challenge is an exhilarating parkour adventure where players must leap, climb, and strategize their way through a sprawling urban landscape. Starting from ground level, the goal is to find the elusive "house" that serves as the gateway to even greater heights. Once found, the journey continues as players ascend rooftop after rooftop, navigating complex jumps, narrow ledges, and towering structures.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Car Parking Simulator
description: Car Parking Simulator is a driving challenge game you won't be able to put down! Whether you want to tackle challenging levels or practice precision parking, you can choose from different modes to start your adventure. From compact car models to heavy-duty truck options, every level offers a fresh driving challenge. As you progress, the levels become more demanding, turning every success into a rewarding challenge.

title: Nuts Puzzle: Sort By Color
description: Nuts Puzzle: Sort by Color is a classic puzzle game where you sort various colored nuts onto screws until they are all the same color. As you progress through the levels, the puzzles get trickier, requiring you to plan your moves carefully and think several steps ahead.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Clean The Ocean
description: Pick up waste, clean up oil spills and heal the oceans bit by bit! Venture out on your own boat, clear out parts of the sea and make sure you recycle everything properly. This game is the perfect way to teach kids about ecology and recycling, or just to pass the time in a mindful way. Level up the ship and leave a lasting legacy on planet Earth.

title: Princess Rescue: Save Girl
description: Dive into a heart-pounding quest in Princess Rescue: Save Girl, a thrilling puzzle adventure full of danger, strategy, and fast-paced action! If you're into dragon-themed puzzles that test your reflexes and thinking skills, this is your next favorite game.

title: Paint Roller
description: Control two tethered spheres in this unique painting challenge. Click to anchor one sphere in place while the other swings around it on an elastic tether, leaving a dynamic paint trail. Your objective? Strategically rotate your tethered pair to completely coat all target cylinders in each level.

title: Fish Jam
description: This game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts. The fish is trapped on the beach, and you need to come up with a reasonable moving plan to release the fish one by one from the crowded scene. Strategize to free the trapped fish on the beach, testing your problem-solving skills. With numerous levels that increase in difficulty, it's a great way to pass the time.

title: Phrasle Master
description: Guess words of wisdom, proverbs and sayings in a fun brainteaser. Tap the words to make a phrase, and try to solve a riddle in 5 attempts using the color hints. As you progress, hidden phrases get longer, so you will need to apply all your logic and puzzle-solving skills to cope with the solve the riddles. Besides, such word games let you expand your vocabulary and learn foreign languages in a fun way. So, prove your skill as you decipher witty quotes and proverbs in a free word game online.

title: Race Clicker
description: Race Clicker is an action-packed idle clicker racing game that'll pump up your adrenaline. Customize, upgrade, and speed your way to victory. Each click pushes your limits, every upgrade unveils new possibilities, and each race dares you to click faster. Leave rivals in the dust and satisfy your need for speed with endless excitement. Start your engines and hit the track now!

title: Hamstercycle
description:
Help a genius hamster bust out of a mad professor's lab on his slick DIY ride - the Hamstercycle!

Jump across furniture and whatever junk the prof left lying around to reach the portal at the end of each room. But watch out - the floor is guarded by laser sensors! Touch it, and the hamster gets caught!

Fun physics, simple controls, and hundreds of exciting levels await!

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Home Run Boy
description:
There is a boy who wants to become a home run king.
He's been practicing his batting and his dream is to hit the ball to the end of the world.
Hit the ball, build up your strength, and hit it farther and farther!

title: Onet Mahjong Connect
description: Onet Mahjong Connect is an easy and fun puzzle game where players match identical tiles. The goal is to connect two matching tiles. Tiles can be linked if they can be joined using three or fewer straight lines. With many levels to enjoy, the game offers a relaxing and engaging experience — perfect for taking a break and sharpening your mind!

title: Escape from the Portal
description:
"Your soul is trapped between worlds. The only way home is to activate an ancient portal... but only one can pass through."
Explore gloomy catacombs, avoid traps, fight monsters, uncover secrets of the past, and use magical artifacts to open the portal and escape the underworld.

title: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2
description: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2 takes you to a vibrant town by the beach where you can test your driving and parking skills in a variety of supercars. Complete challenging parking missions while exploring the scenic coastal streets. You can switch cars on the map, but watch out for the police - get caught stealing a vehicle, and it’s game over! Can you master the art of parking in Beach City without getting busted?

title: Merge Run Battle
description: Merge Runner is an exciting merge game where you combine power and speed to win every challenge. Play a merge runner game with fun arcade merge game mechanics like those in cool math games or reminiscent of roblox and minecraft thrills. Upgrade heroes in an idle merge game and fight in a merge battle game. This merge and run game blends strategy and fast-paced action—perfect for fans of snake game challenges or quick kahoot-style fun.

title: Tiny Fighter - Unstoppable Run
description:
10 Levels of an exciting and action-packed game that brings player to a mysterious woods and castles. The game begins with a dramatic scenario in which a vampire has stolen the princess and the brave Tiny Knight is the only one who can save her.

As the princess is abducted, the Tiny Knight embarks on a quest to retrieve her by through dangerous woodlands and battle his way through the castle's maze. Along the journey, the knight must fight Orcs, Skeletons and win Dracula to save the princess!

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Cute Rabbit's Challenging Adventure
description: Accompany the cute rabbit's adventure together and have fun. I think it will be a little difficult to progress on the challenging tracks consisting of 5 sections in total. Avoid dangers and destroy enemies. Overcome obstacles and have fun times.

title: Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure
description:
Cool orange ball went on an adventure in which evil stones beat him, but the orange ball has 3 hearts. The game is similar to mario and sonic.

Game Features:
- Lots of exciting levels
- Various biomes
- Secrets in some levels
- Skins of colorful balls

Did you like the game Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure? - Then try our other games and write a review on what to improve or what game we should release next!

title: Cat Escape
description: Play Cat Escape, the viral cat puzzle hide-and-seek game now free online! Sneak past guards, dodge traps, and guide your kitty to safety across hundreds of stealth levels. Unlock skins, collect coins, and outsmart enemies in this browser cat game loved worldwide. Want the full mobile experience? Discover more at CatEscapeTheGame.com

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Princess Rescue Fruit Connect
description: Begin a fruity puzzle adventure. Princess Rescue Fruit Connect is a delightful match puzzle game where your mission is to rescue a beautiful princess by matching fruits and solving tricky levels. Connect two identical fruits to eliminate them. But notice clearing the board before time runs out. All while progressing to rescue the princess.

title: Marble Run - Ultimate Race!
description:
Race, roll, and clash in Marble Run, the ultimate marble racing game! Guide your marble through physics-based tracks, dodge obstacles, knock rivals off the edge, and aim for the finish line. 

With fast-paced races, competitive knockout rounds, and fun marble skins, it’s the most addictive 3D marble runner you’ll play!

title: Flick Baseball Super Homerun
description:
Experience various baseball pitches based on the pendulum movement. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation in this baseball game.
# One Flick Easy Control
You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter.

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Town Run
description: Town Run is an excellent option if you enjoy games that require you to run continuously. It combines action-packed gameplay, vibrant graphics, and infinite running! Catching the raccoon is the goal. You'll need to sprint, leap, avoid obstacles, gather cash, and more in order to accomplish that!

title: Superhero Drop and Save
description: Our Super Hero is ready to save the hostages captured by the bad guys. To destroy the bad guys, jump on them and neutralize them by firing small explosions. Act carefully to avoid damaging the hostages from the explosions. You can unlocked new hero skins from the market section with the money you earn. As the levels progress, the tasks will become more difficult, but you can overcome them.

title: Horror Minecraft Partytime
description: Horror Minecraft Partytime is a spooky and interesting horror survival game. This time you will enter a familiar world of blocks. In this hide-and-seek mode, you will be the pursuer, looking for every corner. Find the weirdo in disguise and catch him.

title: OMG Word Sushi
description: Swipe to connect letters and form words in this sushi-themed word puzzle game. Challenge your vocabulary with over 81 levels and a minimalist cartoon style. Perfect for trivia and quiz enthusiasts. Think it's easy? Try the advanced levels!

title: С21A
description:
The endless card game "C21A" is an exciting combination of classic blackjack and addictive strategy. In this game, your goal is to collect cards to score 21 points. But be careful not to overdo it or you will lose! The game offers endless opportunities to develop and improve your skills.
The game "C21A" is a great way to pass your time and test your skills in card games.

title: Office Solitaire
description: Office Solitaire is the classic solitaire variant with the objective of collecting all the cards to the top row in suited sequences from ace to king.

title: Idle Factory Domination
description: Embark on a journey of industrial dominance in Idle Factory Domination. Click on cells to purchase land, invest in businesses and resources to initiate production, and steadily expand your empire to unlock new territories, all while amassing wealth and asserting your manufacturing prowess.

title: Powerwash Simulator - 3D Wash
description: There’s no stain too tough, no dirt too thick that you can’t handle. So gear up, point your washer, and get ready to bring the shine back to everything around you.

title: 2048 - Blocks destruction
description: 2048 - Blocks destruction is endless fun! Rules are simple: shoot balls, destroy blocks and grow numbers. Get balls with bigger numbers and reach higher scores! Get a lot of balls or merge them and increase damage drastically!

title: Samurai vs Yakuza - Beat Em Up
description: Yakuzas have captured hidden treasures and ruins. Take action to save the places from the yakuza using your samurai skills! Fight with yakuza in different locations. Destroy the yakuza using the swords and weapons found in the boxes. The future of the kingdom is in your hands. Prepare for the fight now and save the kingdom!

title: Dynamons 9
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 9! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Halloween world and the bonus cave.

Encounter Tholanyx, Scarykin, Anubolt, Sauryx in frankenstein skin, Zonysus in Dracula skin and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Falling Man
description:
Fall for fun in this addictive hypercasual game!
Ready for a wild ride? Join the thief as he falls from dizzying heights, dodging obstacles and collecting coins in this addictive hypercasual game. With two distinct locations to explore and endless possibilities for high scores, the fun never ends in this exciting game.

title: Mecha Duel
description:
Crazy about robot fighting games? Wanna fight robots on the mech arena? This Mecha Duel game will not let you down. Your robot has to defeat real steel enemies in a mech arena. It’s hard to survive.
Upgrade your hero to defeat war robots. Unleash fighting attacks in one-on-one robot battle with simple gameplay.

title: Drop Bricks Breaker
description: Drop Bricks Breaker is an interesting casual puzzle game. You can relax yourself during play time. You only need to tap the screen to aim the bricks, then launch the ball. Isn't easy it? Come to try it now! Have a great time!

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Fishing Life
description: Fishing Life—a relaxing clicker game with 2D cartoon visuals. Choose your target fish, click the water to reel it in, and manage its energy. Prioritize upgrading Strength first. Skins enhance tap strength, outfits boost damage, and Keepnet nets extra prices. Assistants increase Income, Strength, Damage, and Price. Open chests and claim cash from charged drift bottles. Luck might grant you treasure chests—open them for valuable assistants!

title: Italian Brainrot Find the Differences
description: In this game you have to locate the differences between the two pictures in the limited amount of time given to play each time! To play, use your mouse as control. Make sure that you don’t make a mistake more than three times because that will make you fail. One minute is the total time you will play through the 20 levels in this game! In each level you have seven differences. Good luck!

title: Crowd Evolution!
description: you start as a single person and grow your team by running through the city and gathering people of the same color. Your goal is to build a massive army that no one can stop! Chase down and absorb smaller crowds, but be careful, as larger crowds will try to absorb you. Use strategy and quick reflexes to become the biggest crowd on the map before time runs out!

title: Lazy Workers
description: The employees in the office have started slacking off and everyone is asleep. As the boss, you need to get the office back up and running. To do this, use your mouse and send employees to rows of desks. Move workers so they do not bump into each other. Your job will get a little more difficult with each level. If you cannot pass the level, you can use the option to skip the level.

title: City Builder
description: How do you become the mayor of your town? Find the right valley and build everything from scratch with your own hands. Then the residents will help you make your town even better and even share their equipment!

title: Snow Rush 3D
description:
Snow Rush 3D is a fun sledding game that tests speed and reflexes for winter sports enthusiasts, playable in both 1 and 2 players! Try to reach the longest distance by overcoming obstacles and ramps on a challenging snow-covered track, or challenge your friend!

Snowmen, obstacles and tricky turns await you along the way. How far can you go and how many gifts can you collect?

title: Vex X3M 3
description: VEX X3M 3 is here! The most intense Vex hill racing experience yet. Race through new levels filled with traps, sand, electricity, and unpredictable terrain that test your timing and skill. Ride through pipes, master new physics, and take on hard mode or a CPU opponent. Unlock powerful bikes, beat every track, and prove you’re a true VEX X3M rider. Start your engine and take on the challenge!

title: The Best Warrior
description: In The Best Warrior, you start as a humble peasant with one goal—to become the greatest warrior in the kingdom. Train by clicking on dummies to build attack power, defeat enemies for gold, and unlock powerful skins to grow even faster. Face epic bosses, collect timed chest rewards, and rise through multiple levels. With nonstop action, upgrades, and progression, this free adventure clicker game lets you prove your strength with every tap. Start your journey now and become a legend!

title: Two Stunt Supercars
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Polygon Space
description: Polygon Space is an intense shooting challenge. Fly a laser cannon in space, battle attacking sci-fi shapes, keep firing, upgrade weapons with resources, destroy them all, and stay safe.

title: Perfect Job Run
description: Run your way to the perfect job. In the Perfect Job Run, you'll run the platform of the workplace. Facing various challenges, selecting the right career path and becoming a winner in the workplace. There will be different career tests along the way. Quickly select tools to accomplish tasks.

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: School simulator: My school
description:
Welcome to School Simulator: My School! In this game you need to manage your school, open new classrooms, toilets, canteen, hire staff and help students to learn.
The more classes, the more schoolchildren. The more schoolchildren, the more money. The more money, the more opportunities to develop the school.

title: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots
description: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots is a fast and rewarding collection game where action, risk, and strategy come together. Your mission is to break brainrot eggs, collect rare Brainrot characters, and safely deliver them to your base before time runs out. Each run is a mix of decision making and reflex.

title: Stickman escapes from prison
description: New prison escape adventures welcome you! Your task is to play as a Stickman and find all the ways to successfully escape from prison. 10 different items to choose from are hidden in a secret place. Some items will lead you to victory, but many other items will lead you to death. Interesting animations and jokes will delight your attention. Check out all the items and enjoy the different situations in the zone.

title: Word search
description:
A beautiful word puzzle game with challenging yet addictive features for hunting down the words you love! Train your brain in a fun and relaxing way and take your critical thinking skills and IQ to the next level.
Find all the words on a given topic. Words are arranged horizontally, vertically, diagonally, and may overlap.

title: Burger Tycoon
description: Start your journey as the owner of a small burger joint and work your way up to building a massive fast food empire! Take full control of every aspect of the business—from grilling delicious burgers and serving customers to managing staff and expanding your restaurant chain. Upgrade your kitchen, optimize your workflow, and attract more customers to grow your brand. Can you turn your humble burger stand into the ultimate fast food empire?

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Hopnova
description: Hopnova is a fastpaced vertical adventure where every jump takes you closer to the stars. Guide your little explorer across floating platforms, avoid dangers, and discover powerups that boost you higher and higher. Chase new heights, beat your best scores, and enjoy quick, addictive gameplay perfect for short, exciting sessions.

title: Oreplication
description: Sandbox strategy tycoon where you design factories for infinite wealth. Start with basic droppers & conveyors, upgrade to advanced machines. Deep progression, mystery boxes, endless optimization—build, outsmart, ascend in the ultimate factory challenge!

title: Hexa Sort Master
description:
Let's sort some hexa blocks on the hexa tiles. Hexa blocks consist of colorful pieces. Place the same colored pieces side by side and match them to stack all hexas over one tile.
A great puzzle game begins with colorful hexa blocks! Sort the stacks side by side and try to destroy them making hexa towers. Match the same colors with each other. Exercise and improve your brain skills. More than 200 levels are waiting for you!

title: Rummy 500 Card Game
description:
Features :
- Offline game.
- 3 Super Modes: classic mode, 3 player mode and Speed mode.
- Auto arrange the cards
- Game statistics.
- Easy to play 
- Excellent and fair ai to play with.
- Continue the last game from where you left.
- No login required

title: Noob Village Tower Defense
description: Dive into the dynamic world of a 2D platformer, where you play as a noob fighting for the survival of your village! Your main goal is to protect the village from endless waves of monsters appearing from an ominous portal. Control the tower manually: select shells, adjust the trajectory and shoot enemies one by one. Only your accuracy and tactics will help you survive the onslaught!

title: Sniper Shot Secret Mission
description:
Sniper Shot Secret Mission is a game of nerves and skills. Each time you start the new level, a challenge is waiting for you to solve. Never fire on the wrong target otherwise their no second chance as a sniper. 
As a sniper you need to work silently once you shoot the bullet everyone will be aware of the situation and you might loose your target. You can be targeted through security guards once you shoot at your high profile targets.

title: Woodland Slide
description:
Embark on a relaxing journey in Woodland Slide! Slide the colorful jewels across wooden planks to create perfect matches and clear the board.

With every move, a new row of gems disappears, adding to the challenge. Use your strategy and unlock powerful abilities to remove gems, split them into smaller pieces, or clear entire rows.

Explore a serene, nature-inspired setting while testing your puzzle-solving skills. How far can you go in this addictive quest for the perfect match?

title: Supermarket Cashier Simulator
description:
Practice being the best cashier in the supermarket. Become a mathematician by calculating and entering prices of grocery items and giving change to your customers. By playing you also improve your mathematical skills with the calculator in the game. This game is suitable to be played by adults or teenagers.

With the supermarket cashier game, you will improve your skills and concentration in calculating and also increase your level of accuracy.

title: Obby - Escape Barry's jail parkour
description: An incredible escape from the New Barry Prison awaits you! Cool locations, parkour and obby. Show your agility to avoid getting caught by Barry.

title: Popcorn Fun Factory
description: Popcorn Fun Factory is a fun idle game where you get to run your very own popcorn factory! Start off small and work your way up by unlocking new production lines and creating different flavors of delicious popcorn. With simple and intuitive gameplay, you can sit back and relax while your factory does all the work for you.

title: Grandma Recipe Ramen
description: It's time to serve a delicious Ramen! Ask grandma for the recipe. Prepare the tools and gather the ingredients. Mix the ingredients perfectly, then decorate the Ramen. Keep following grandma's instructions to finish making the Ramen! Don't forget to dress up in various cute costumes. Making Ramen has never been more fun!

title: Jewel Garden Story
description: Enter a dazzling realm where sparkling jewels await your matching skills. Challenge yourself to achieve high scores and enjoy the visually stunning jewel combinations. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts seeking endless entertainment.

title: Froggy Hop
description: Froggy Hop is a fun, physics-based game where you launch a bouncy frog and help it travel across lily pads, turtles, and spring pads while dodging obstacles. Upgrade jump power, height, and bounce to go farther. Unlock cool skins with upgrades, complete daily missions, and aim for the best distance!

title: Fashionista Avatar Studio Dress Up
description: It is a fun, creative dress-up and hairstyling game for all ages. Players mix and match outfits, hairstyles, and accessories to create stylish looks. The game features cute characters, diverse clothing options, and a salon scene for designing unique hairstyles, colors, and headpieces. Enjoy endless fashion fun and creativity in a joyful, relaxed atmosphere.

title: Cars Merge
description:
Feel the thrill as racing cars zoom by at lightning speed on the track!

Get your hands on these incredible cars and watch them blaze across the raceway. Show off your passion for speed and excitement by collecting them all!

How many will you collect? Play now and find out!

title: Kids Coloring
description: Children adore entertaining coloring activities, and this Coloring Game stands out as one of the finest free coloring books and painting apps designed for kids!

title: Cut Grass
description: Do you know powerful a ring blade is? Cut Grass will show you a famous Mexican weapon in a 3D collecting puzzle arcade game. Here is some weed on the mud, your mission is to cut them all down at all levels. Without time and score limitations, keep calm and have a good time!

title: Hidden Object - Girl and Cat
description:
You play as a sweet girl walking through the forest with her cat, Lassie.
Our girl was walking and everything was wonderful: the birds were singing, the flowers were a delight to the eye, and suddenly the cat meowed and ran off into the depths of the forest.
Our girl searched for her cat in the forest for a long time and didn't notice how night had fallen. Wandering through the forest, the girl came across an old house. What if our cat ran in there?

title: Artillery Vs Tanks
description: In this game, you take control of an artillery unit and engage in combat against enemy tanks. The result of the battle hinges on how precisely you target your shots – will you obliterate all the tanks before they reach you, or will they overpower you? Take out your foes and collect rewards to enhance your howitzer's performance and acquire fresh, more formidable artillery weapons!

title: Patterns
description: Help Ellie recreate magical patterns using grass, fire, clouds, and more elements as you uncover the hidden order of each level.

title: Let The Train Go
description: Unblock Metro is a fascinating puzzle game. You need to move all the vehicles in front of the metro so that the metro drives smoothly along the track. You have to be careful that the head of the vehicle is facing that way and you can't change the direction of the vehicle. There are cars,trucks, ambulances, and so on. Lovely pictures and a wide variety of cars give you a refreshing gaming experience. The intricate vehicles placed in front of the metro will dazzle you. Waiting for your challenge！

title: Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle
description:
Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle! is a relaxing and brain-teasing puzzle game where you must spot, drag, and fix the misplaced parts of beautiful images.
Each level challenges you to find hidden pieces, pull them out, and place them exactly where they belong.
With handcrafted levels, soothing music, and satisfying visuals, it's the perfect game to relax and train your observation skills.
Can you restore every picture to perfection?

title: Desert Rover Survival
description: Desert Rover Survival is an idle survival adventure set in a harsh desert world. Begin with a simple setup and slowly build your own desert rover, upgrading parts and improving technology to push farther into the wasteland.

title: Last Standing
description: Players are dropped onto a map and start without weapons. The map is scattered with a wealth of weapons and equipment. Players need to constantly explore and collect these resources to enhance their survival ability and combat power. The core goal of the game is to be the last survivor. Usually, there are multiple players in each game, and they are randomly distributed on the map.

title: Muscle Challenge
description: Run, eat healthy foods and proteins and avoid harmful foods, drinks and obstacles in the Muscle Challenge game! Defeat your enemies with the strength and muscular body you gained at the end of the race! The enemies get stronger in each level, so you have to get better too... If you want, you can also play the game in challenge mode with your friend in 2 Player mode.

title: Noob Legends Dungeon Adventures
description: Dive into a thrilling 2D action-platformer! Battle zombies, drones, upgrade weapons, rescue friends, & uncover hidden secrets!

title: Mushroom blocks
description: Meet colorful and diverse mushrooms! Collect mushroom blocks, earn points and win the rankings! On the way you will encounter all kinds of obstacles: lightning, bombs, frozen cells and others. Try to overcome all obstacles and hold out as long as possible, plunging into the cozy atmosphere of mushroom picking, accompanied by pleasant music!

title: Fashion Dye Pro
description: Fashion Dye Pro is a fun-filled shirt DIY game. Follow the hottest summer trends! Tie-dye summer clothing and beach accessories! Show off your creative skills by customizing tie-dye outfits to your liking. Get requests from customers and paint garments at will. Being creative isn't hard: first tie it up, then dye it! Unleash your DIY art cells and leave everything to the dye! Get high this summer! Come join us!

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: Solitaire Match
description: Let's develop the village by accumulating coins in Solitaire. When you match cards to make a total of 10, the cards will disappear, earning you coins.
