Continue removing cards until there are no more matching combinations, and clear the stage by achieving the coin quota. If the quota is not achieved and the slots become full, it's a failure. Earn more coins by matching combinations with a greater number of cards or by continuously matching cards in a short amount of time.

title: Hide Ball
description: Hide Ball is an addictive puzzle game where your mission is to protect the red ball from dangerous spiky enemies. Use the given blocks to build a safe shelter and hide the ball. Each level brings a new challenge — the constructions become trickier, and the enemies more relentless. Plan your moves, create a solid defense, and save your little hero!

title: Festival Vibes Makeup
description: Join Ellie in Festival Vibes Makeup, a vibrant game radiating the spirit of the summer festivals. Delight in creating neon, boho-Aztec, and grunge makeup looks as you test your makeup artist skills in this colorful makeup game for girls. Mix, match, and shine with stunning eyeshadows, mascaras, lipsticks, and glitter eyebrows!

title: Hexa Blast Game Puzzle
description:
Hexa Blast Game Puzzle is a fun and challenging game! Try to find the right combination of hexa puzzle. Just drag and drop all the hexa block game on the board. The rule is simple: everything must fit! Enjoy the satisfaction of pieces fitting neatly in place.
Our unique hexagonal pieces will stretch your mind in ways you never imagined in this addictive hexa block puzzle game.
Keep your brain active and sharp, analyze all the possibilities and try to finish all puzzles.

title: Hide And Seek Horror Escape
description: Hide And Seek: Horror Escape is an asymmetric horror escape game. Abandoned schools and haunted hospitals, here's a lot of hidden secrets and treasures are waiting to be discovered. During the game, there are two identities for you to choose, hide or seek?

title: Pumpkin Patch
description: Immerse yourself in the mysterious world of a magical pumpkin farm, where pumpkins are so diverse and full of surprises that it's hard to tell one from the other! Your task is to carefully observe each pumpkin character and remember as many details as possible. Can you recognize and find two identical pumpkins among many others?

title: Geometry Open World
description: Geometry Open World is a fast-paced 2D action game where players pilot a ship through perilous obstacles, engage in thrilling battles against diverse enemies, and take on epic boss fights. With a vibrant and dynamic open world, strategic upgrades, and powerful abilities, you can chart your own path to triumph. Will you conquer the challenges, defeat the bosses, and rise to become the ultimate champion in this open-world geometric action adventure?

title: Striped Fruit - Watermelon Land
description:
Welcome to the enchanting world of Striped Fruit that full of strategy and fun. Here, you'll become a watermelon maker extraordinaire, mastering the art of fruit merge to create the juiciest combinations on the board. As a merge master, you'll tap, drop, and combine fruits in a strategic dance.

The challenge? To reach your way to the top, the first step is to merge 2 melons to create a watermelon - the King of Fruits. Can you merge 2 watermelons to smash them out? Let's check it out!

title: Spot&Differs
description: A new exciting game "Spot&Differs" for children and adults! Find differences between two pictures and train your brain and mindfulness. If you like to play logic games, join us!

title: Save My Pet Party
description: Cute pets need protection, would you like to help them? Draw protection walls for bees coming from different locations in each level and stop them. In levels you find difficult, you can get hints or skip the level directly. You can play Save My Pet Party game in 1 Player or 2 Player modes.

title: Smart Dots Reloaded
description: Smart Dots Reloaded is a fresh remake of the classic Dots and Boxes puzzle from Windows 3.1. Players take turns drawing lines between dots. Completing a square earns a point, and the game ends when the board is full. Featuring modern visuals, smooth animations, and both AI and two-player modes, this is a strategy game that’s easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Back To School: Uniforms Edition
description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! This fun dress-up game lets you spin the wheel to unlock school uniforms from countries like Japan, the U.S., the U.K., India, France, and South Korea. Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Jump Girl 3D
description: Jump Girl 3D is an addictive casual jumping game. It's time to stack your own tofu towers and help the lively girl climb the delicious bouncy tofu trampoline tower. Beware of obstacles that appear from both sides and try to stand in the middle for a smoother and safer ride. Try to challenge every move and unleash the girl's acrobatic skills! Go, Tofu Girl!

title: BFFs Golden Hour
description: Fall is here and the BFFs decided to take the perfect photos with their Instagram-worthy makeup and outfits. Elsa, Ellie, Kiki, and Regina are all in charge of getting amazing images for their fall aesthetics album, so make sure you come and join them in their BFFs Golden Hour dress up game for girls! Help them get ready by dressing them up with a variety of beautiful outfits, accessories and makeup styles then snap the most instagrammable pictures you need for their album. Enjoy playing!

title: Driverz Ed
description: Driverz Ed invites you into an open-world driving adventure where exploration meets discovery. Collect hidden puzzle pieces scattered across diverse locations, unlock a wide selection of cars, and complete missions that blend racing with strategy. With free exploration, fast travel, and mission tracking, the game delivers a fresh take on the driving genre while keeping every ride exciting and unpredictable.

title: Fighter Stick Hero
description: Welcome to Figher Stick Hero Stickman, an exhilarating 2D stickman game that will test your dueling skills. Whether you're playing in an arcade or survival mode, get ready to engage in intense battles against your opponents. Choose from a variety of weapons, character colors, and character decorations to customize your stickman. Remember to attack while moving to gain an advantage and earn higher scores by defeating other stickmen.

title: Music Cat! Piano Tiles Game 3D
description: Discover a wonderful world of music and fun with this new free online game! Looking for a cute cat game? Do you want to feel the rhythm of the music in your every move on the tiles? Then this dance runner with cute dancing cats is exactly what you need!

title: Bubble Shooter HD 3
description: Bubble Shooter HD 3 is the long-awaited third sequel to the the legendary Bubble Shooter game. Bubble Shooter HD 3 features the classic Bubble Shooter HD gameplay with a set of fresh new bubbles, the option to choose between the arrow vs pointer when shooting bubbles as well as the mighty BOMB feature that lets you blow up 15 bubbles at once. So what is the highest score you can achieve? Enjoy Bubble Shooter HD 3 now and break a new record!

title: Snake Out
description: Dive into Snake Out – a vibrant puzzle adventure packed with fun and challenges! ?✨ Sharpen your skills, conquer tricky stages, and enjoy endlessly rewarding gameplay. Ideal for casual gamers and puzzle lovers alike! ?

title: Cake Sort
description:
Cake Sort is a colorful and cozy puzzle game where you stack and sort delicious desserts to score as many points as possible! Move cakes around the table and match them by type to build perfect stacks of identical treats.
Bright graphics, smooth animations, and tasty visuals make the game relaxing, cheerful, and endlessly replayable.
Your goal is simple — keep sorting cakes and earn points for every perfect match until the table is full!

title: Draw To Smash!
description:
Draw To Smash — a logic puzzle game in which you should draw a line, scribbles, figures or doodles to smash all the bad eggs.

Draw To Smash is an amusing logic game that will test your IQ and raise your intellectual abilities to a new level. Plan every step, estimate a possible outcome and build tactical strategies. Solve logical puzzles, pass interesting levels and open bonus levels.

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Jewel Link
description:
Connect matching jewels and clear the board! In Jewel Link, a Connect2 game inspired by Bejeweled, your goal is simple: find two identical jewels and link them together to make them disappear. 

As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging and trickier. Placements will test your ability to think ahead and spot Connect-2 connections quickly. It’s not just about what you see - it’s about how you navigate the board to match the jewels.

title: 67 Clicker
description:
Forget everything you know about gaming. Experience the absolute peak of interactive entertainment. It’s not just a number; it’s a lifestyle. Tap the 67 and watch your empire grow.

FULLY AUTOMATED STONKS: Buy upgrades to make the 67 click itself. It’s literally free real estate.

PEAK BRAIN ROT: No thoughts, just 67. The perfect idle experience for fans of "number go up" simulators.

title: Last to leave circle Obby
description:
Last to leave circle Obby - is a dynamic online game in the style of Roblox, where only the most dexterous and persistent can win! Exciting obby challenges, dangerous traps and intense battles with other players are waiting for you. Going outside the circle means you're out, and the circle is getting smaller and smaller!

Tense obby challenges that will test your reaction and agility.
Roblox-style game with unique multiplayer.
Ability to compete with friends and players from all over the world.

title: Rescue Hero
description: The hero begins his journey for treasure and save princess, but the puzzles in front of the hunter trapped him. What you need to do is to pull the pins in the right order, so that the hero can take the hidden treasure and save princess away from dragon, wolf and monster safely.

title: Find the Sprunki
description: Find out the hidden Sprunki in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden Sprunki. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: Riot Village
description: Step into Riot Village, a thrilling browser-based adventure where your shooting skills and strategy are tested. Navigate 10 intense levels with AI enemies. Visit the market to choose from 6 unique weapons and equip up to 4 in your inventory. Switch weapons during gameplay to overcome challenges. The game features automatic character movement, letting you focus on aiming and shooting. Adapt your strategy as each enemy wields different weapons. Are you ready for the challenge?

title: Emoji Sort – Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Emoji Sort is a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where you match and organize cute emojis into the right tubes! Test your logic, plan your moves carefully, and enjoy hundreds of relaxing levels. Simple to play yet hard to master — perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers alike.

Play now and see if you can complete every emoji challenge!

Features: smooth animations, colorful visuals, satisfying gameplay, and brain-teasing fun made for everyone!

title: Crazy Traffic Control
description:
You control the traffic in the most realistic, craziest one-touch traffic game!
Put your timing and skills to the test with:

- realistic traffic 
- realistic acceleration   
- realistic stopping times!
- trains
- cows
- pedestrians

Unbelievably absorbing and incredibly fun — clear the intersections with Crazy Traffic Control!

title: Bank Boom Tung Tung Sahur
description: Are you ready for a bank heist? You have 20 seconds to crack the safe! Compete with your friend — the first to open the vault wins. Smash the safe open and beat your friend to it. Hit your friend with a club to slow them down and win the race. The club is a powerful weapon. The fate of the game is in your hands. Strike fast and unlock the bank vault!

title: Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL
description:
Madness: Sheriff's Compound is a thrilling, action-packed survival game where players must navigate a chaotic compound overrun by anarchy and danger. Set in a gritty, lawless frontier, the game pits players against waves of unpredictable enemies, demanding quick reflexes, sharp strategy, and resourceful thinking to survive.

Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL is the one and only authentic game of the Madness series, available on gamedistribution.com and itch

title: Super Cloner 3D
description: In Super Cloner 3D, you are a unique super cloner on a mission to infiltrate dangerous environments. Use your cloning powers to escape traps, kill enemies, and accomplish secret missions.

title: Stack Fall
description:
Smash the floor! 
Are you under stress? Maybe Stack Fall can help you to release the stress. 
As your ball keep breaking the floors to get to the goal, every smashing will ease your stress. 
It's time to break some stacks!

title: Jailbreak Assault
description: In Jailbreak Assault, you’re a prisoner on a daring escape mission. Starting in your cell, you grab a key dropped by a guard, unlock the door, and arm yourself with a baton. Battle guards, destroy vital documents, disable cameras, and unlock new areas as you fight your way through each mission. Eventually, you’ll secure a gun from the armory, using it to take on the heavily guarded outer perimeter. Can you make it to freedom?

title: Farm Block
description: Farm Block is an engaging farm-themed puzzle game where players slide adorable animal blocks to free them from the farm. Test your strategic thinking and enjoy the charming countryside setting! With its mix of puzzle-solving and elimination mechanics, Farm Block offers a fun and rewarding challenge for all ages.

title: Detective - Logic Puzzles
description:
Become a Detective! Solve logic puzzles to find the criminal! 
Lots of levels and interesting stories!

You will have to solve a lot of different cases, in this you will be helped by the method of deduction known to all detectives.

title: The Prism City Detectives
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure with "The Prism City Detectives" and join Luna, Ruby, Skye, Willow, Daisy, Violet, and Lumi in restoring color to their monochrome city! Explore dazzling dress-up levels and unravel hidden objects mysteries to find the missing Rainbow Gem and bring back the hues of unity.

title: Reach 2048
description: The classic 2048 puzzle — slide numbered tiles on a grid, merge them, and reach the legendary 2048 tile! Simple to learn, impossible to put down. Challenge your brain with this addictive number puzzle. Plan your moves carefully, build combos, and aim for the highest score. How far can you go beyond 2048?

title: Sprunki Coloring Book
description:
Dive into a colorful adventure with Sprunki Coloring Book, a delightful game designed for kids and adults alike. Choose from a wide variety of adorable Sprunki characters, captivating landscapes, and fun designs to color your way. Whether you're a budding artist or simply looking to relax, Sprunki Coloring Book offers endless possibilities for self-expression.
Start coloring today and discover the joy of creativity with Sprunki Coloring Book!

title: Obby 3D Sprunki Parkour
description: Obby 3D Sprunki Parkour combines the best elements of obstacle challenges and parkour gameplay in an immersive 3D environment. The goal? Navigate through increasingly complex levels filled with moving platforms, tricky jumps, and narrow ledges while collecting coins and power-ups along the way. Each level offers unique challenges that test your timing, reflexes, and problem-solving skills.

title: Mine & Slash
description:
Embark on an epic RPG quest, as you dig and explore your way through a rougelike 3D world filled with magic and adventure.

As a miner, you have the unique opportunity to collect gold and valuable resources as you dig deeper and deeper into the dungeon. Unlock powerful skills to become even stronger!

title: Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle
description: Dive into the enchanting world of Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle, where flowers bloom, bees buzz, and your mind gets a delightful workout! This unique 3D puzzle game combines stunning 2D and 3D graphics with a relaxing, chill vibe, making it the perfect escape for players of all ages.

title: Duo Family Santa
description: Steve and Alex need to race against each other. The one who holds the Lucky Block wins the game. Hold onto the Lucky Block until the time runs out to win the game. You can earn money by collecting socks and you can also earn money by defeating your friend. You must be very careful; steal the Lucky Block from your friend and keep it until the time is up.

title: Digger Fighter in the Maze
description: Digger Fighter in the Maze is an action-packed adventure game that takes you deep into a mysterious underground labyrinth filled with secrets, dangers, and treasures. Step into the shoes of a brave digger fighter as you tunnel your way through winding mazes, uncover hidden paths, and gather valuable resources. Along the way, you'll meet and recruit powerful allies, each with unique abilities that can help you overcome obstacles and defeat fierce enemies.

title: Wolf Life Simulator
description:
Wolf Life Simulator: A Realistic Animal Simulation Game
Explore the life of a wolf in Wolf Life Simulator, the most realistic animal simulation game ever! Become a wolf and learn how to survive, hunt, mate, and fight against other predators. Experience the thrill of the wild in this exciting wildlife game. Are you ready for the adventure? Try Wolf Life Simulator now and have fun!

title: Brain Find Can You Find It
description: Brain Find brings new brain puzzles! Combine brain power and discovery for a brain challenge like no other! You can use your brain and reverse thinking to get the final target item. The unexpected way of passing levels can bring you endless laughs.  The game tests your logical thinking skills, reflexes as well as memory and creativity. Come and experience it and prove that you are the smartest!

title: Pinball Basketball
description: A captivating fusion of classic arcade pinball excitement and thrilling sports gameplay. Flip your paddle skillfully to keep the ball in play, aiming for the basketball hoop while enjoying the stunning minimalist art and responsive design that make every moment electrifying and addictive.

title: World War Brothers WW2
description:
⭐WORLD WAR BROTHERS⭐
World war brothers is a ww2 online first person shooter game. Play with your friends destroy enemy bases, capture the points. Traditional weapons, maps, and more will add soon. We need your feedbacks.
⭐ Features ⭐
- PvP multiplayer 8v8 Allies vs. Axis Teams
- Daily missions will come soon
- Omaha Beach, Pacific maps

title: Sisyphus Simulator
description: An addictive and challenging hyper-casual 3D game. Push the rock up the hill cleverly so that it won't fall down. Reach the top of the hill and collect the honor star to complete the challenge and raise your name on the Honor Board.

title: Lingo Dreams
description:
Learn English while playing
Lingo Dreams is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that helps you memorize English words through matching exercises. Find the correct pairs between your native language and English to complete each level.

Perfect for beginners, kids, or anyone who wants to expand their vocabulary while having fun.

title: Sliding Gems
description:
Embark on an enchanting journey of matching gems! Dive into a realm filled with shimmering jewels, tactical maneuvers, and irresistible puzzle trials.

Slide and place vibrant gems to unveil newfound powers.

Confront challenges with diverse boosters to overcome obstacles and achieve higher scores.

title: Basketball Fever
description:
Get ready for endless basketball fun! Basketball Fever features four exciting basketball challenges anyone can enjoy. 

Sharpen your aim, beat your high score, or just enjoy quick bursts of arcade-style fun, Basketball Fever delivers nonstop action that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down. It’s the ultimate way to test your reflexes, timing, and accuracy.

Simple controls, smooth gameplay, and satisfying physics make every shot feel rewarding.

title: Tap Bead
description: Tap Bead is a relaxing puzzle game. Arrange beads by color to match patterns and clear levels. Simple controls, soft visuals, and many levels make it a soothing, satisfying experience.

title: Archers Ragdoll Physics
description: Archers Ragdoll Physics is a physics-based archery action game where ragdoll characters fight using special arrows. The game features 10 characters and 12 unique arrows such as lightning, fire, poison, missile, and rocket. Players can equip three arrows and switch between them during battles. Some levels include traps like electric cables and spinning gears that can be activated with arrows. In 2 Player Mode, players choose from 7 arrows and compete to hit their opponent the most.

title: Pocket Parking
description: Get all the cars out of the parking lot wthin the time limit! The car goes straight forward and backward. Move it in a direction where there are no walls or cars.

title: Merge Hospital
description:
Play as Doctor Player in Merge Hospital and discover the many secrets of your staff members, and what is happening in and around the Hospital. In Merge Hospital by Operate Now you will merge and build, meet and love many skilled surgeons, doctors and other interesting characters. You will learn more about their stories and how they got into the hospital.

As Dr. Player you must:
MERGE medical items, pies and much more!
DISCOVER the story of a medical drama like in your favorite TV shows.

title: Unscrew Them All
description: Unscrew Them All is a challenging  puzzle game where players must strategically unscrew all the screws securing large wooden planks to the board. After removing each screw, place it into the correct open slot. Unscrew all the planks before time runs out to complete each level. Master every level to win the game!

title: Christmas Candy Escape 3D
description: Christmas Candy Escape 3D is a casual puzzle in which you have to fall safely. It is deceptively simple, yet profoundly deep. Play through the extensive stages, sharpening your wits as you have fun. Have a try!

title: Real GT Racing Simulator
description: "Real GT Racing Simulator" offers the ultimate driving experience for racing enthusiasts. Get behind the wheel of meticulously detailed cars and race on stunningly realistic tracks. Compete in high-speed circuits, fine-tune your vehicle for peak performance, and rise through the ranks to become a true racing legend. This game emphasizes authentic driving physics, customizable cars, and a variety of racing modes—from casual races to full championship tournaments.

title: ROYAL COIN RUSH
description: Drag adjacent coins to swap them, and line up three or more vertically or horizontally to remove them. Special coins appear when 4 or more coins are matched. Mix effects by combining special items! The stage is cleared when all the target coins are erased.

title: GT Formula Championship
description: GT Formula Championship is an exhilarating high-speed racing game that brings the thrill of Formula racing to life. Step into the driver’s seat of the most powerful and technologically advanced Formula cars as you compete against elite racers on world-class tracks. With intense competition, realistic physics, and breathtaking visuals, this game delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience like no other.

title: Dinosaur Shifting Run
description: Get ready for a prehistoric race unlike any other! Dinosaur Shifting Run throws you into a thrilling adventure where you transform into mighty dinosaurs to overcome obstacles and outrun rivals.

title: World Flags Trivia
description: Challenge your geography skills in World Flags Trivia! Identify the nation for each flag from three choices across 194 questions. Perfect your skills as you progress through increasingly tricky questions. Can you score a perfect game and become a true flag expert? Play now and find out!

title: Geometry Subzero
description: Welcome to Ice Age in Geometry Subzero! The new interface of this game has captured any player's heart. Instead of a basic interface, you can experience the cold air when it's snowy in this game. The main character is a little monster who is frozen. The monster moves forward on a road with many spikes. Move, jump, and slide to overcome these dangers! In this game, the diversity of characters is one attractive feature. You can move a turtle, penguin, seal, etc to overcome challenges in this game.

title: Jungle Match Adventures
description: Jungle Match Adventures is a brand-new Match-3 game set deep in the lush Amazon Rainforest. Join the fearless explorer Aria as she uncovers hidden treasures, ancient relics, and precious gems buried in the jungle. Match colorful stones and nature-themed items, solve fun and challenging puzzles, and unlock secrets along the way. Take part in Daily and Weekly Challenges, enjoy Daily Surprises, and progress through hundreds of exciting levels in this unforgettable jungle adventure.

title: Clash Crowd Game
description: Clash Crowd Game is an addictive arcade runner game where you tap to run, survive obstacles, and reach the destination. Control your crowd, avoid traps, and face thrilling challenges in every level. Easy controls, engaging gameplay, and colorful 3D graphics make this game perfect for quick fun. Run smart, grow your crowd, and prove your survival skills.

title: Dress Princess
description: You will transform into a fashion stylist, creating a unique look for the beautiful princess! The game offers a vast array of gorgeous clothing styles, from sparkling evening gowns to fresh and sweet daily dresses, everything is available. Every piece of clothing is carefully designed, with exquisite details displayed in every detail. ​

title: Asoka Makeup Indian Bride
description: Immerse yourself in the colorful world of the Indian wedding tradition with Princesses Jacqueline and Eliza! Help them create the perfect wedding look with the help of various cosmetics and accessories. Use bright shadows, radiant blush and long-lasting lipstick to make the princesses look dazzling. Do not forget about the traditional jewelry: nath, earrings and necklace. Complete the image of an Indian bride and help the princesses become the most beautiful on the holiday!

title: Dream Pet Hotel
description: Dream Pet Hotel is a charming connect puzzle game with an engaging hotel meta. Match tiles to clear levels, earn rewards, and unlock cozy rooms. Decorate and furnish spaces to create a unique style, then welcome adorable pets to stay in your hotel. Watch your collection grow as you design the perfect home for cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Relaxing, addictive, and fun to play online — build your dream pet hotel today!

title: COINs
description: A line of 10 coins with the same number changes to a coin with one higher number. Coins can be moved anywhere, even to empty lines or on coins with different numbers. You can add coins at any time. The game is cleared if you make a coin with the number 10! The faster the clear time, the higher the score.

title: ASMR Nail Treatment
description: Today's patient is dealing with thickening of the fingernails. Help her maintain good nail hygiene by providing proper nail care. Showcase your medical skills by performing this ASMR Nail Treatment game. Once the treatment is done, dress her in fashionable outfit and create captivating nail art using various styles and accessories.

title: Physics Box 2
description: Get ready for a fun and challenging physics game with 45 levels to complete. Easy to play but challenging to complete. Just tap or click on the screen to shoot an impulse out of the box that will make it move. Trickly levels will have you getting the box to buttons to open gates, avoiding sawtooth obstacles and making the box invincible to laser gates.

title: Pickle Ball Clash
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Pickle Ball Clash — a thrilling sports game where every match is a battle of skill, speed, and strategy. Customize your character, unlock powerful paddles, and climb the competitive ranks from backyard brawls to pro-level leagues. Whether you're smashing winners or pulling off trick shots, the court is yours to conquer. Are you ready to clash?

title: Geometry Dash Maze Maps V2
description: Welcome to Geometry Dash Maze Maps V2. It's a test of your agility and intelligence as you guide the square through thrilling challenges. The game features six levels, each filled with tricky mazes. The cube will automatically rush forward at a fast pace, making it challenging to keep up. Your goal is to navigate through the obstacles in time. Jump over sharp spikes, leap onto platforms, and make use of the yellow boosters to soar even higher.

title: Demolition Derby Derby
description: Welcome to Demolition Derby the mobile sensation where you control the chaos! Strategically tap to toss dynamite and swipe to send rocks crashing down. Decimate buildings and statues with precision in this hyper-casual game.

title: School Love Story # 1
description:
Dive into an immersive anime visual novel about first love, friendship, and school adventures! Experience a unique branching storyline where every decision you make affects the outcome.

Why You'll Love This Game:
4 romantic routes with distinct characters – from a charismatic musician to a mysterious programmer!
Dynamic plot – your choices alter the story (with 10+ different endings!).
Stunning anime-style artwork and beautiful background music.

title: Destruction of Stickman Zombie
description:
Take a weapon and destroy the zombie stickmen! "Destruction of Stick Zombie" is an exciting game in which you will fight against hordes of stickman zombies using your skills and strategies. You have to fight zombies to earn coins and improve your weapons.
You start the game as a regular player, but as you progress in the game, you become more experienced and skilled in combat. The more coins you earn, the more weapons and ammo you can buy.

title: Daily Jewels Blitz Mahjong
description: Enjoy Daily Mahjong with a sparkling jewels twist! Play a unique layout every day, match dazzling gem tiles, and keep your streak alive to earn boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, and Torch. Track your longest streak and collect daily rewards as you match your way through beautiful designs. Miss a day? There’s a rare chance to recover it. Relax, match, and dive into the timeless charm of Daily Mahjong with a brilliant jewels theme!

title: Underwater Survival Deep Dive
description: This is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. You'll encounter a vast open world filled with wonders and dangers! Survival in this alien oceanic world demands quick thinking and resourcefulness. Your ship is your raft.

title: Obby Modes! Online Mini-Games
description:
Is a massive online world where three unique modes are waiting for you!

Take on the challenge of 100 levels of hard obby, compete in crazy races with 5 players, and test your fate on a glass bridge in the spirit of Squid Game!

Create your unique character by choosing from over 100 cool skins!

Team up with friends using a code in squads of up to 3 people and conquer all modes together!

Ready to show off your agility and strategy? Set records and become a legend!

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Yummy Trails
description: Can you help the hungry snake navigate the tastiest trail of all? The path may be tricky, but the reward is delicious. Test your brain and relax.

title: Tile Fruits
description: In Tile Fruits, embark on a delectable adventure packed with vibrant fruits and captivating challenges! This 2D tile-matching game tests your strategic prowess as you aim to connect three identical fruits to advance through progressively difficult levels. Each match removes the fruits from the board, but beware: having more than seven different types of fruits on the board at once results in a loss.

title: Family Squid Challenge
description: Hey Player, bring your friend along and team up in this Squid adventure! There are black and red masked men everywhere, so you must be very careful. Run from them and collect the keys to complete the level. Be cautious — both of you need to survive!

title: CS: Chaos Squad
description: CS: Chaos Squad is an exciting 5v5 team-based shooter that demands tactical thinking, teamwork, and quick reflexes. Engage in fast-paced battles where you can purchase weapons and gear each round, allowing you to adapt your strategy on the fly. The ranking system tracks player and team performance, encouraging continuous improvement and competition. Fight for victory, build team synergy, and prove that your squad is the best on the battlefield!

title: Cars with Guns: Wasteland Showdown
description:
Accept the challenge of the post-apocalyptic wasteland. Take on contracts, earn money and reputation, and collect valuable loot.
Survival belongs to those with the fastest ride and the biggest gun.

title: Mahjong Earth
description: Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of Mahjong Earth! This captivating game offers a tranquil escape with its soothing earth-themed soundtrack and stunning tile designs. Explore over 250+ unique puzzle layouts, each more challenging than the last. Use the Combo meter to match quickly and earn stars. Climb the leaderboard for recognition and claim boosters by reaching the top. Immerse in the relaxing soundtrack and earthy tiles for a truly calming experience!

title: Brawl Bros Squad
description: Introducing a new exciting third-person shooter — Brawl Bros Squad! Fight opponents in a variety of conditions. Discover a variety of unique skins to make yourself unique. Enjoy dynamic jumps, accurate shooting and get ready for intense battles. Become a real champion among players around the world and prove that you are the best in this crazy world!

title: Dirty Them All
description: Let's splash some dirt over the walking people near the road with this Dirty Them All game! Drive your car through the mud and splash it all around the other people. Let them chase you until the finish line. The more people chase, the more scores you get. Let this funny and entertaining adventure begin!

title: Sokoban Push The Box
description: Challenge your brain in Sokoban - Push The Box. This is a timeless classic puzzle game. Enter a clever maze full of crates, tight corners, and tricky layouts. Your task is simple but challenging. Push every box to the correct spot. Each level will test your logic, patience, and planning skills. One wrong move could block your path, so think carefully before every push. But keep an eye on your move count.

title: 2 Cars Run
description: 2 Cars Run is a dual racing game where you need to control the vehicle to avoid all obstacles. The difficulty of this game is that you have to control one car while taking care of the other. Well, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: Toilet Pin
description: Join the daily story of the toilet boy in the monster letter world. This new pin pulling game is for you. Let's explore Alphabet Lore with extraordinary characters! In the land of evil letters, you will have a chance to meet various amazing characters and powers of them: evil B ready to punch in your face, Angry C biting with sharp teeth, boring F with a gun, Crazy Z with fire, monster D who loves lava ....

title: Merge Galaxy
description:
The famous merge game is arrived!
You can shoot the planets like balls to throw, and when the same planets touch each other, it becomes bigger planet!
Cute planets want to be bigger, so keep merge the planets until you make the sun!

title: Moto Cabbie Simulator
description: Welcome to Moto Cabbie Simulator, where the thrill of the open road meets the fast-paced world of urban transportation! In this exhilarating and immersive gaming experience, players take on the role of a daring motorcycle taxi rider navigating the bustling streets of a vibrant city.

title: Falling Blocks - Halloween Challenge
description: Step into the Halloween fun with Falling Blocks - Halloween Challenge, a thrilling match-3 arcade game! Match 3 or more spooky blocks, including pumpkins, ghosts, and skulls, as they rapidly fall from above. Your reflexes and strategy will be put to the test to clear the board and prevent a pile-up. Featuring vibrant Halloween visuals and addictive gameplay, this game provides hours of entertainment for all ages. Face the challenge, set high scores, and embrace the Halloween spirit!

title: Army Defence Dino Shoot
description: Army Defence Dino Shoot is a third-person defense idle game. It seems that a lot of dinosaurs surround you. To protect the base from incoming dinosaurs, you can summon more soldiers and engineers to create a defensive line. Don't forget to upgrade your weapons, damage, and fire rate skills. The longer you hold this position, the more dinosaurs you will meet. Have a good time building a military base.

title: Mighty Run
description: Mighty Run is an action-packed platformer where you jump, dodge obstacles, and defeat enemies to progress. Collect gifts along the way and reach the end to grab the diamond, unlocking the next level. Use power-ups, master tricky jumps, and overcome challenges in this thrilling adventure. With smooth controls and exciting gameplay, every level is a test of skill. Can you collect all the rewards and reach the finish line? Play Mighty Run now and prove your skills!

title: Color Yarn Sort
description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces—there’s no room for error!

title: Cool SuperCars Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Hide And Seek Blue Monster
description: Enter a world full of mystery and fun. In Hide And Seek: Blue Monster, you will experience a unique hide-and-seek adventure. The game combines casual games with puzzle challenges. You should keep running away to prevent being caught by the blue monster, and when the blue monster is staring at you, hold stop in front of the fruit, in front of the coke, or front of the water glass, etc.

title: Robbie: Stand on the Right Color!
description:
Welcome to the vibrant world of speed and reaction!
You are about to be tested on your attentiveness and lightning-fast decisions. Your task is simple but tricky: step on the right color before the floor disappears beneath your feet!
Suitable for anyone who loves fast, simple, and addictive games.
Are you ready to help Robbie stand his ground?

title: Truck Stack Colors
description: Get ready for an exciting challenge. Truck Stack Colors takes you into a wonderful world of parkour and truck stacking. In attractive levels, advance by stacking platforms that are the same color as the truck. To master the balancing and stacking skills to build amazing truck towers and climb even higher.

title: Mr Throw
description: Mr Throw is a game in which even an old teddy bear can become a deadly weapon! Calculate the strength and direction of the throw and throw at the enemy all the things that come to hand! Victory in this dangerous garbage battle!

title: SHOT CAN WILD
description: Keep tapping to shoot and prevent the can from falling! The game ends when you run out of ammo. Hit the center of te target for a COOL SHOT! Chain COOL SHOT to restore ammo!

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Grukkle Onslaught
description: Grukkle Onslaught: Defend the blue portal in this thrilling tower defense game! Strategically place towers to fend off waves of enemies and protect your gateway. Master strategy and quick thinking to emerge victorious. Play now and prove your skills!

title: Popping Pets
description: In Popping Pets, stack and match adorable pets to score points! Connect three or more adjacent pets to clear them before time runs out. Look out for bombs for big clears and big points. Can you reach the highest score in one minute?

title: Soldiers - Capture and Control!
description: Step into a battlefield where childhood toys clash in an action-packed war between rival soldier factions. Command your forces, capture strategic points, and fight your way to victory.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Dino Egg Shooter
description:
Dino Egg Shooter is a fun and addictive puzzle game set in a colorful prehistoric world.
With 100 levels of increasing difficulty, players aim and shoot colorful dino eggs to clear the board. 
Each level presents unique challenges, from tricky formations to limited shots.
Easy controls and charming visuals make Dino Egg Shooter perfect for all ages.
So, get ready

title: Memory Wars
description: Memory Wars takes the classic memory-matching game to a whole new level with exciting battles, unique enemies, and powerful card effects. Use your brainpower and tactics to overcome a variety of foes and emerge victorious in every stage!

title: Jigsaw Fantasy
description: Jigsaw Fantasy is the perfect game for puzzle lovers! Choose from a wide collection of puzzles, each offering a relaxing and fun experience. Want a personal touch? Upload your family photos and turn them into custom puzzles. Simply drag and drop the scattered pieces into place to complete the image. With intuitive controls and a clean interface, Jigsaw Fantasy is great for kids and adults alike.

title: Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle
description: Ready to challenge your mind and intelligence in the Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle. This casual 3D Screw Puzzle game will take you into a world of creativity and puzzle solving fun. Here you need to match the screws of the same color and move them to the correct box. You sort screws by their colors. Keep moving the model to find the corresponding color.

title: Squid Game Memory Card Match
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game Memory Card Match! Test your memory and focus as you uncover pairs of iconic Squid Game symbols and characters. Can you keep your cool under pressure and match all the cards before time runs out?
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who can master the ultimate memory test. With Squid Game Memory Card Match, every flip brings you closer to victory or defeat – can you handle the pressure?

title: OUTSIDE
description:
OUTSIDE is a sleek and minimal puzzle game where every move matters. Guide a one-eyed character through a grid to collect the key and reach the exit — but there’s a twist: once you start moving, you won’t stop until you hit a wall.

Plan your route carefully, avoid dead ends, and use the environment to your advantage. With simple mechanics and clean visuals, OUTSIDE is easy to pick up but tough to master — a perfect test of logic and spatial thinking.

title: 2248 Block Merge
description: Upon beginning to play, you will undoubtedly become hooked on these 2048 puzzle games. They are crafted with stunning visuals and user-friendly gameplay, making them an excellent option for enthusiasts of number block puzzle games.

title: Tung Tung Sahur: Obby Challenge
description: Jump into the viral madness of Tung Tung Sahur: Obby Challenge — a hilarious meme-based platformer where you dodge traps, jump across chaos, and try to survive with style. Inspired by trending TikTok memes, especially the absurd world of Italian Brainrot Animals. Play as the one and only meme legend, Tung Tung Sahur, and conquer chaotic Obby parkour levels like never before.

title: Murder
description: Ready for the scary world of Murder? Colorful Halloween scenes, accompanied by scary ghosts and jack-o '-lanterns, enhance the immersion of the game. On this most mysterious night,let you try a nervous assassination adventure! You will be a cunning assassin who will seize the moment to kill the king. Play the king when you kill successfully.

title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
description:
Enjoy a relaxing round of Golf Solitaire, a fun and easy-to-play card game. The goal is to clear the board by matching cards that are one rank higher or lower than the one on the discard pile. Don’t worry about suits—just focus on the numbers! If you’re stuck, you can draw from the deck to keep the game going. Play at your own pace and see how many rounds you can win.

Perfect for a quick break or to unwind at the end of the day!

title: Thrill Roller Coaster
description: Thrill Roller Coaster is a fun 3D roller coaster simulator game. Press and hold to accelerate forward, your speed and acceleration is fast enough for you to reach the other end of the track. Watch out for the brakes in the middle and drive the roller coaster at breakneck speeds now! Experience speed and passion!

title: Poke The Presidents
description: "Poke the President" is the perfect stress-reliever game. Defeat politicians by throwing various weapons. The objective is to creatively inflict damage upon the politicians and watch them react in humorous and exaggerated ways. Earn money to buy various weapons and items in the shop. Have fun!

title: Marble Puzzle Quest
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Fruit Match
description:
A fresh twist on fruit puzzles!
Tap two identical fruits to detach them and send them falling into the basket.

But it’s not that simple — fruits follow real physics. They can get stuck, stack, and only fall further when you clear what’s below.
Use gravity to your advantage, trigger chain reactions, and watch satisfying cascades unfold.

Clear the board and keep the flow going as new fruits drop in!

title: Clash & Run
description: One chance, no turning back. Speed is your only ally in a world that won’t wait. Race through ever-shifting terrain where every jump could be your last. Collect coins and unlock unique looks. Precision and quick thinking will keep you in the game longer.

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: This is a first-person psychological horror game where you work night shifts in a small street kiosk. What seems like a normal job quickly turns into a nightmare: customers grow increasingly strange, and reality itself begins to warp. Some people just want to eat — others are only pretending to be human.

title: Idle Merge Car And Race
description:
An addictive idle car merging game. Build your own car racing company and grow your business.
Move your cars to the racing track and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new cars (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level cars to upgrade into a new type. The better the cars, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster! Become the richest in the world in this idle merge car game.

title: Wood Block Puzzle 3
description: Wood Block Puzzle 3 is a polished, relaxing 10×10 wooden block game featuring a fresh UI, smart boosters, and satisfying break animations. Drag shapes from the right tray, complete rows or columns to score, and chase your best record. Use boosters at the bottom—watch rewarded ads to earn coins and unlock boosters when needed. Simple to learn and hard to master, it’s perfect for quick breaks or long zen sessions.

title: Unicorn Princess Dress Up
description: Welcome to Unicorn Princess Dress Up, a casual girl dress-up game online. Dive into a fashion world where you design fashionable clothing, create trendy hairstyles, and produce perfect eye makeup. Unleash your creativity and talents in fashion design to make your princess doll charming and beautiful!

title: My Dinosaur Land
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of "My Dinosaur Land"! This is an exciting game where you will become the owner of a unique farm filled with dinosaurs! Your task is to transform an ordinary farm into a real dinosaur paradise, taking care of funny and exciting creatures of prehistoric times.

title: Tony Archer
description:
Evil hooligans have caught your friends, free them quickly and punish the villains!
You are the great Tony Archer, a dude who masterfully handles all types of weapons, can run fast and is a former military man! In his hands, even a stick becomes a deadly weapon! And Tony Archer knows how to stealthily eliminate enemies. Every villain in this city will be punished and all the main character's friends will be saved! Fight on city rooftops, secret laboratories and enemy military complexes.

title: Miner's Fury!
description:
Miner's Fury! Avoid and destroy!

Clear and destroy rock waves. Lookout for mystery rocks too! Buy and deploy Turrets to breeze through levels. 
Collect the coins that drop from the destroyed rocks, and spend them buying Turrets, and to Upgrade yourself. Upgrades will make you deal more damage faster, earn more coins, as well as improving your spawned Turrets.
Lookout for Missions to earn rewards!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Nuts & Bolts Sort: Color Puzzle
description: Play Color Sort Puzzle: Nuts & Bolts free online and challenge your mind in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Unscrew, swap, and organize bolts by color in a satisfying logic puzzle that works as a focused brain game for all ages. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for smart, addictive sorting fun anytime.

title: Letters Match
description: Letters Match combines the best of the games you love. This is a mixture of matching games, word search and clearing the playing field. We took all these ingredients and spiced it up with exciting gameplay. If you like to stretch your brain with puzzles, then Letters Match is what you need!

title: Mind Games for 2-3-4 Player
description: Mind Games is a huge game where you can find 2-3-4 player games while playing. The game consists of 27 games under various categories like skill games, Brain Games, matching games, pop-it games, mancala, ludo, and Tic Tac Toe games. Each of these games is fun and made for kids and it is safe to play. Most of these games can be played 2 player, 3 player or 4 player.

title: Math Quest
description: "Math Quest" - an exciting game for the whole family that develops mathematical skills, logic, and reaction speed. Overcome challenges, calculate correct answers, and reach new levels!

title: Real Parkour Simulator
description: Real Parkour Simulator is an addictive 3D parkour adventure game. You play as an ambitious protagonist determined to conquer the world of parkour. Taking you on an exciting journey to new heights as you run, jump and climb in an immersive world. Will you rise to the challenge and become a parkour master?

title: Blocksss
description:
Blocksss is challenging, exciting and sometimes infuriating minimalist puzzle game. Enjoy the world's most beloved puzzle game for FREE!
Easy to play, and pleasurable game for all ages.

title: Delta Force Airborne
description:
This game offers a whole new level of graphics and sound design that completely immerses you in a realistic atmosphere of battles. 
Shoot and use tactical thinking to overcome obstacles and achieve victory together with your team. 
Explore a variety of maps, each of which is full of unique opportunities and strategic points.
Become a master of team play by coordinating with your teammates and using different character classes to create the perfect strategy.

title: Stickman Prison Escape
description: Stickman went back to prison for committing a minor crime. It's time to find a successful way to escape from this cold, gray prison. Guards and other difficulties await you along the way. There will be a choice of 3 items that the guard brought hidden in the pumpkin. It's Halloween time and pumpkin will help Stickman successfully escape prison.

title: Obby Rainbow Tower
description: Obby Rainbow Tower is a fast, winter-themed tower race where every second and every jump matters. Each floor is packed with moving platforms, icy tiles, spinning lava bars, surprise snowstorms and snowball portals that try to knock you into the void.  You can replay the tower as many times as you like, trying to beat your own best time or racing a friend side by side in 2 player mode.

title: World Soccer
description:
There are four objects, pull the object you want and fire it.
The object moves and pushes the other object or ball away
If you push the ball into the net before the opponent, you win!

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Mahjong Quest: Candyland Adventures
description:
Ready to go on a magical quest through a land made of candy?
Jump into Mahjong Quest: Candyland Adventures - where every corner is bursting with sweetness and surprises!

The streets are sprinkled with tasty treats, and they’re all yours to match! Find the snacky pairs, clear the board, and munch your way through this delicious adventure.

Can you collect all the colorful, candy-coated tiles? Play now and let's find out!

title: Wordler
description:
It's the same English word guessing game as Hackman I played when I was young.
You are given six chances to guess a word that consists of only five letters.
How many times can you get it right?

title: Two Stunt Racers
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning sports car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Bow And Arrow
description:
? Bow and Arrow – Master Your Archery Skills! ?

Step into the world of precision shooting in Bow and Arrow! Test your skills, aim with accuracy, and hit your targets in a variety of exciting levels. Whether you're shooting at moving targets, battling enemies, or competing in archery challenges, this game will put your skills to the test!

title: Cosmic Dash
description: Jump into Cosmic Dash – an endless space runner full of speed and challenges! Dodge debris, break through asteroids, and gather tokens as you race across the solar system. Use boosts, shrinks, and jumps to chase high scores and experience thrilling interplanetary action!

title: MineTap Merge Clicker
description:
MineTap is an idle clicker with merge mechanics and crafting. Also there is an adventure, where you can fight zombies and other monsters and even build your own village!

Enjoy mining and treasure hunting. Complete quests and level up your character. Craft your ultimate weapon and slay epic monsters!
Have you ever had a dream to be a hero and save the world? Then tap to play and become a legend of crafting.
Start your epic mining adventure right now - click, tap & rock!

title: Blue Mushroom Cat Run
description: Catch the mischievous thief in Blue Mushroom Cat Run! A cunning thief has snatched your gold, and guess what? Unlock vibrant worlds and zoom through endless obstacles in this action-packed runner. From sun-kissed beaches to neon-lit night streets, every map offers fresh surprises and heart-pounding thrills.

title: Airport Controller
description: Take control in Airport Controller Game! Manage planes, guide safe landings, refuel, repair, and board passengers while handling growing airport traffic. Test your skills in this fast-paced simulation and keep everything running smoothly. Play now!

title: Cross the Road
description: Experience the classic arcade action of Crossy Road in Roblox style! Navigate through endless roads, rivers, and train tracks, dodging obstacles and aiming for the highest score. With its vibrant voxel-style graphics and simple yet challenging gameplay, it's a nostalgic journey for both new and seasoned players.

title: Alchemy Puzzle
description:
We create challenges with fun puzzles, challenge your brain and make you always smile on your lips.
Alchemy Puzzle will help you have moments of light entertainment, combined with puzzle play and fun real life characters.
If you've ever played games: puzzlers, word games, trivia games, quiz games, brain teasers, or just want to spend time have time to relax, let try Alchemy Puzzle, It's for you.

title: Idle Game Prison Life
description: Ever dreamed of running your prison? Now’s your chance! In this casual idle simulator, you’ll create a high-security prison empire. Upgrade and expand until you are on your way to becoming a tycoon! Create the perfect prison layout with cells, kitchens, gyms, and surveillance! Recruit guards, medics, and more to keep things under control.

title: Meme challenge.io
description:
"Meme Challenge.io" is straight-up chaos.
It’s you vs. the wildest, most unhinged character names ever like Spaghetti Tualetti and Bombardino Crocodilo. Tap fast, think faster, and don’t get caught slippin’. It’s giving brain-lag.
Only real ones can vibe their way to the Wcup.

title: Merge Fruit
description: Looking for something fun, relaxing, and totally addictive? You just found it. Merge Fruit is a simple but surprisingly strategic puzzle game where you combine fruits to create even bigger ones. It’s a satisfying blend of logic, timing, and casual fun that’s perfect for any moment.

title: Car Park Simulator
description: Welcome to Car Park Simulator, Are you ready to test your driving skills and master the art of parking? Navigate through 72 challenging levels filled with obstacles and narrow spaces...

title: Shadowman Runner
description:
Shadowman Runner is a dark, atmospheric endless runner inspired by the minimalist silhouette style of Limbo and the fast-paced arcade spirit of games like Soul Knight and Alto’s Adventure. Set in a mysterious black-and-shadow world, the game challenges your reflexes, timing, and focus.
You play as a lone runner sprinting through a dangerous jungle landscape. Your goal is simple yet addictive: run as far as you can, collect potions to score points, and survive.

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker
description: Get ready for the cutest twist on the viral Brainrot universe! Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker is the baby-themed sequel to the hit Brainrot Clicker! Tap your way through the baby versions of your favorite characters, collect upgrades, and enjoy a whole new atmosphere with colorful visuals, cheerful music, and fresh sound effects designed to fit the playful baby theme!

title: Cool Man
description: Hi there! It sounds like you're interested in playing Cool Man Adventure, To play, you'll need to jump & run on platforms, avoid obstacles and fire gas , robo, gear ring , and defeat enemies. Don't forget to collect key along the way! The game has 10 levels for you to explore, so there's plenty of adventure to be had.

title: Shape Shift
description:
Shape Shift is a fast-paced arcade game set in colorful outer space. Pilot your spaceship through a field of moving geometric shapes and collect the correct targets to score points.

But stay sharp, the target shape or color constantly changes. One moment you must collect blue circles, the next moment it might switch to red triangles. Grab the right shapes and avoid the wrong ones as long as you can!

title: Fruit Merge Reloaded
description: Dive into the juicy and colorful world of Fruit Merge Reloaded, a captivating merging game that combines the addictive gameplay of 2048 with the sweetness of your favorite fruits! Your task is to merge identical fruits to create new and exotic varieties, aiming to reach the ultimate fruit fusion.

title: Authentic Football
description:
3D modeling technology is employed to construct a lifelike football field, encompassing elements such as the green pitch, goalposts, and stands, thereby creating an immersive match atmosphere.
The player and football models also boast a high level of intricacy. The players' movements are smooth and natural, and the flight path of the football adheres to the laws of physics, enabling players to feel as if they are in a real - life football match.

title: Bubble Shooter Butterfly
description:
Bubble Shooter Butterfly is your next favorite bubble shooter game! It is a classic arcade game with a fresh look and new twists. With its bright butterflies and breezy gameplay this online butterfly game is perfect for Spring and Summer.

The game includes 300 diverse levels, divided over beautifully serene day and night backgrounds. Release all the butterflies and achieve the highest scores!

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Free the Ball
description: Try out Free the Ball, a super fun puzzle game! Your job is to guide the ball to its goal by moving blocks around. And get this – there are a whopping three thousand levels to play, and they're all free! No need to buy anything.

title: Magic Kingdom. Hex Match
description: Magic Kingdom: Hex Match is a game where you are the third son of a great king, sent to a distant land to prove your worth. Collect six vital resources—food, water, stone, wood, workers, and metal—to construct new buildings. Unlock all structures and create a stunning, magical kingdom!

title: Brainrot Merge Drop Puzzles
description: Drop and merge Italian Brainrot. Trallallero Trallala, Tum Tum Tum Saur, Boneca Ambalabu and more. Play funny memes. Drag and drop memes.

title: Noob: Saving friends
description:
"Noob: Saving friends" - An adventure in an interesting and captivating world with Nubik.

Together with Nubik, you will mine and sell ores, buy new pickaxes, upgrade skills, and try to uncover all the secrets! Will you be able to challenge the dragon and earn the maximum coins? Or maybe luck from the lucky block will smile upon you?

title: FNF 2 Player
description:
FNF 2 Player allows two players to play at the same time. Players can compete with each other by choosing the characters they want. The difficulty level can be determined by the music, thus appealing to all types of players.

Game Modes: 

- Story Mode: You fight with new characters weekly.
- Freeplay Mode: You can play by choosing the song you want.
- 2 Player Mode: It's time to duel with your friend.

title: Bolts and Nuts - Sorting
description: Bolts and Nuts - Sorting is a captivating casual game where each level challenges your logic and attentiveness! Unscrew bolts, collect nuts, and solve puzzles to progress. Simple controls and intuitive gameplay make the game accessible to everyone, while gradually increasing difficulty keeps it exciting.

title: Train Drift
description: Train Drifting is an addictive arcade racing game that offers players a unique and incredible train drifting experience. In this game you will become a real master of drifting on iron horses.

title: Idle Baseball Tycoon
description: Play Idle Baseball Tycoon free online and step into a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Build your dream team, upgrade stadiums, recruit players, and grow profits in a smart manager sim that blends idle strategy with brain game decision-making. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly, working perfectly on desktop and mobile. It’s a free online game made for quick breaks and long-term domination.

title: Black Pink St.Patricks day Concert
description: Step into the glamorous world of Black Pink St. Patrick’s Day Concert, the ultimate dress-up game! Style your favorite Black Pink members with trendy outfits, accessories, and makeup to make them shine for their St. Patrick’s Day performance. With simple controls and endless creativity, this game is perfect for quick fun or long gaming sessions.

title: Bubble Shooter Free 3
description: Bubble Shooter Free 3 is back with a long-awaited 3rd sequel to one of the most popular bubble shooter games there is! This bubble shooter embraces endless gameplay that is designed for players to enjoy hours and hours of fun without time pressure. It boasts the ‘Bubble Swap’ feature which lets you swap the current bubble in your shooter with the incoming one as well as the BOMB which creates huge explosions popping 15 bubbles at once! Now the players can play even more strategically!

title: GTA: Grand Vegas Crime
description: Grand Vegas Crime is an open-world action game set in a sprawling city inspired by Las Vegas. Players take on the role of a daring gangster looking to rise through the criminal underworld. The game offers intense missions, thrilling car chases, and fierce shootouts against rival gangs and law enforcement. Grand Vegas Crime delivers an adrenaline-pumping experience filled with crime, action, and adventure.

title: Valentine Hidden Heart
description: Dive into a world of love and discovery with "Valentine Hidden Heart" - the ultimate romantic hidden object adventure! Unleash your inner cupid as you embark on a delightful quest to find the 10 hidden hearts in each of the 15 enchanting levels.

title: Car Racing 3D Drive Mad
description: Here is a car racing arcade game. You have a chance to control a car equiped with nitro system. You can collect the fuel to charge it. Try to defeat other AI players by avoiding obstacles and using nitro items. Have a good time!

title: Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up
description:
In Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up, you’re dressing up your doll and getting her ready to go live. Pick from different styles—she can look like a fairy, wear chill street clothes, or go for a beach outfit. When you’re done, she jumps on the stream and starts showing off her look.

You can mess with her hair, add makeup, and try out accessories. There’s also a battle mode where you go up against other players to see who styled it best.

title: Alphabet Merge and Fight
description: Evolution Merge games that you like! Monsters from all over the universe are alive! Drag and combine letter monsters in the mutant fighting simulator. Play and explore Alphabet Letras workshop and adventure games! Monsters from other universes have joined the alphabet kitchen to fight in evolution games! Play in 3D as one of your favorite characters from the collection.

title: Drive, Race, Crash
description: Drive, Race, Crash is a game that will give you hours of fun and adrenaline.  Drive a variety of cars, choose your own style of play and go to conquer the tracks in races, participate in derbies, jump off the ramp or explore the city

title: Build A Queen 2025
description: In Build a Queen 2025, you will embark on a fun journey to become a real queen. You will need to make your way through different platform levels with your opponents. Choose outfits, skin colors, and more according to your goals. Dress up in the most glamorous queen look, meet the prince, and win. You can collect money to unlock more dance steps.

title: Color Cocktail
description: Clients are waiting for drinks from you, quickly prepare drinks for clients and collect points. Combine identical balls to get new fruits. Come on, everyone is waiting for you!

title: Nose Hospital
description: In Nose Hospital Games, The patients are counting on you in this nose surgery hospital game. Will you rise to the occasion and become the hero in plastic surgery games, they desperately need? Step into the operating theater and redefine the world of nose plastic surgery games.

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: Leap and Avoid 2
description: Get ready for another thrilling journey with the white ball! "Leap and Avoid 2" brings new caves, lab levels, and fresh mechanics. Discover secret paths, collect coins, and unlock powerful bonuses like speed boosts and shields. Jump on white platforms, avoid black ones, and explore in all directions to find exits. The more coins you gather, the higher you rank. Compete with friends and uncover every hidden treasure!

title: Water Sort
description: Experience the simple yet addictive water sorting puzzle game! It’s the ultimate free game for training your brain, killing time, and relaxing!

title: Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills
description:
Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills is a tense survival horror where you roam a fog-covered forest to steal brainrot pages while being hunted by the relentless Sahur entity.
No weapons, no escape-only rising whispers, shifting woods, and the race to survive before the echoes of “TUNG TUNG TUNG SAHUR” close in.

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: Mermaid Wedding World
description: Mermaid Wedding World is a creative dress-up and decorating game for girls. The princess of the ocean kingdom is getting married to a human and they are going to have a wedding now. You can help prepare the food, set the table, serve the people, and play music. You may help the bride, groom,and other guests to dress up and makeup. You may also decorate the room to your liking.

title: Phone Case DIY Run
description: Phone Case DIY Run is a very fun simulation game. What type of phone case do you have now? If you are interested in making a phone case, then come and join us to learn about the process! Collect the models, choose your favorite color for painting, then paste the picture and choose the pendant. Finally, the more phone cases you collect when you reach the end, the more money you get. Have fun!

title: Bunny Blox
description: Help the Bunny collect as many blox as possible. Match 3 or more items. Slide left or right to move the item. Slide up to rotate and slide down to drop the item. Special rewards appear during the game. Use them wisely to destroy strategic areas.

title: 2248 Blast
description: Are you ready to train your brain while having fun? 2248 Blast is a highly addictive number-connecting puzzle game designed to relax your mind and sharpen your logic skills! With simple swipe controls and engaging gameplay, this game is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

title: Zombie Redemption
description: Zombie Redemption is an action-survival game set in a world where a failed experiment has turned most of humanity into zombies. Players earn gold by defeating zombies, which can be used to unlock stronger weapons. However, zombies also attack, making quick reflexes and strategic thinking essential for survival. Combining elements of strategy, action, and survival, this game offers an unforgettable adventure in the fight to save the world.

title: Mustang City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate realistic traffic and monitor your fuel while exploring busy streets. Enjoy stunning night city graphics, transforming the city into a neon-lit spectacle. Pedestrians add unpredictability, and hitting them triggers police chases. Customize your car's appearance and performance. All this chaos is accompanied by your cute dog. Whether evading the cops or just cruising, Mustang City Driver offers a thrilling and visually amazing experience.

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: 4 Colors Card Mania
description:
4 Colors Card Mania is a thrilling and fast-paced card game inspired by the uno gameplay. Challenge against AI opponents in this colorful and strategic showdown.
Can you outwit your opponents and become the 4 Colors Card Mania champion? 
Shuffle the deck, deal the cards, and get ready for a colorful adventure!

title: The specimen zero
description:
The moment has arrived to persevere in a hostile and mysterious environment. In the 3D horror game Specimen Zero, sick creatures creep across rooms, trying to murder you until you can find a way to escape.

You are terrified, you have no idea where you are, and your last memory is of being abducted. However, an unusual and maybe hazardous event has taken place in that peculiar location. A means of evasion from such establishments must be found by you.

title: Horror Playtime Room Escape
description: Challenge your brain to break through the fog of horror. In Horror Playtime - Room Escape you will enter a mysterious story. You spend your birthday with Ye Chen on the roof of a building. The strange woman suddenly appeared and trapped you in a horrible room. Enter many rooms full of puzzles and horror! Use your brain to solve hidden things and uncover the truth of horror stories. Every detail in the room is full of mystery.

title: Find The Cat - Cat Search
description: Discover the exciting world of finding hidden cats in this original puzzle game! Look for cats on black and white backgrounds by tapping on them to complete levels. With each stage, you will unlock new places and receive unique challenges that will test your attentiveness and observation skills.

title: Stickhole.io
description: "Stickhole.io" is a thrilling game with single and two-player modes. In single player, swallow stickman and defeat bosses within time limits. In two-player mode, compete to eat the most stickman, then battle with collected characters. Dynamic gameplay and colorful graphics make it addictive and fun.

title: Power Light
description: Move the tiles around until the power can flow freely to the light bulb. Power up the light bulb to complete each level in this fun online puzzle game

title: Bffs Cherry Blossom Celebration
description: Step into the vibrant world of BFFs Cherry Blossom Celebration, the ultimate dress-up game where best friends come together to shine under blooming cherry trees! Pick your favorite crew of BFFs and deck them out in stunning spring outfits—think pastel dresses, floral crowns, and cherry blossom vibes.

title: Merge Drop
description: Buy and merge balls. Drop them to break the cubes. Every ball will multiply when they touch the cubes. If your balls can reach the end of the level you win.

title: Monkey Bubble Defense
description:
Survive the bubble invasion in this fast-paced 2D top-down tower defense game. Construct and upgrade various defensive turrets to take down hordes of bubbles.

Earn cash by popping bubbles. Use cash to to purchase new towers, upgrade existing ones, or sell for cash and reinvest into a different turret.

title: Roblox Craft Run
description: Welcome to begin a 3D running adventure full of speed and creativity in Roblox Craft Run. In this pixel-craft game, you'll control your character as he runs and jumps around an exciting platform track. Jump across the bridge and walk into a new level. Start your journey through the maze. Challenge your jumping skills and strategy.

title: Ocean Pop
description: Ocean Pop is a lively underwater puzzle game where real 2D bubbles float, bounce, and cluster with natural physics. Pop matching bubbles, trigger chain reactions, and enjoy dynamic, ever-shifting puzzles. Its colorful ocean setting, smooth mechanics, and playful movement create a relaxing yet engaging experience that’s easy to learn and satisfying to master.

title: Dream Room Makeover
description: Welcome to Dream Room Makeover, part of the beloved Room Makeover game! You've just purchased a charming old house with a sprawling garden, but it's in need of some TLC. Get ready to renovate with stunning graphics and fresh furniture. Your dream home awaits – play Dream Room Makeover for free today!

title: Last Ufo Defense
description:
Last UFO DefenseThe galaxy is no safe place. 
As the last UFO of your kind, you stand alone against endless waves of hostile alien forces determined to wipe you out.
